en.yusufali.text: Or He bestows both males and females, and He leaves barren whom He will: for He is full of Knowledge and Power.

segments: ЫҢШ§ ЩҫШіШұШ§ЩҶ ЩҲ ШҜШ®ШӘШұШ§ЩҶ ШұШ§ ШЁШ§ ЩҮЩ… ШЁЩҮ ШўЩҶШ§ЩҶ Щ…ЫҢ ШҜЩҮШҜ ЩҲ ЩҮШұ Ъ©ЩҮ ШұШ§ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ ЩҶШ§ШІШ§ Щ…ЫҢ Ъ©ЩҶШҜШӣ ЫҢЩӮЫҢЩҶШ§ЩӢ Ш§ЩҲ ШҜШ§ЩҶШ§ ЩҲ ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҶШ§ШіШӘ.
fa.ansarian.text: ЫҢШ§ ЩҫШіШұШ§ЩҶ ЩҲ ШҜШ®ШӘШұШ§ЩҶ ШұШ§ ШЁШ§ ЩҮЩ… ШЁЩҮ ШўЩҶШ§ЩҶ Щ…ЫҢ ШҜЩҮШҜ ЩҲ ЩҮШұ Ъ©ЩҮ ШұШ§ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ ЩҶШ§ШІШ§ Щ…ЫҢ Ъ©ЩҶШҜШӣ ЫҢЩӮЫҢЩҶШ§ЩӢ Ш§ЩҲ ШҜШ§ЩҶШ§ ЩҲ ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҶШ§ШіШӘ.

segments: ЩҲ ЩҠШ§ ЩҮЩ… ЩҫШіШұ ШҜЩҮШҜ ЩҲ ЩҮЩ… ШҜШ®ШӘШұ. ЩҲ ЩҮШұ ЩғШі ШұШ§ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ Ш№ЩӮЩҠЩ… Щ…ЩүвҖҢЪҜШұШҜШ§ЩҶШҜШҢ ШІЩҠШұШ§ Ш§ЩҲ ШҜШ§ЩҶШ§ ЩҲ ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҶШ§ШіШӘ.
fa.ayati.text: ЩҲ ЩҠШ§ ЩҮЩ… ЩҫШіШұ ШҜЩҮШҜ ЩҲ ЩҮЩ… ШҜШ®ШӘШұ. ЩҲ ЩҮШұ ЩғШі ШұШ§ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ Ш№ЩӮЩҠЩ… Щ…ЩүвҖҢЪҜШұШҜШ§ЩҶШҜШҢ ШІЩҠШұШ§ Ш§ЩҲ ШҜШ§ЩҶШ§ ЩҲ ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҶШ§ШіШӘ.

segments: ЩҠШ§ [Ш§ЪҜШұ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ] ШўЩҶЩҮШ§ ШұШ§ ЩҫШіШұШ§ЩҶ ЩҲ ШҜШ®ШӘШұШ§ЩҶ [ЩҮШұ ШҜЩҲ ШұШ§] Щ…ЩүвҖҢШҜЩҮШҜШҢ ЩҲ ЩҮШұ ЩғЩҮ ШұШ§ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ ЩҶШ§ШІШ§ Щ…ЩүвҖҢЩғЩҶШҜ. ШЁЩҮ ШұШ§ШіШӘЩү Ш§ЩҲ ШҜШ§ЩҶШ§Щү ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҶШ§ШіШӘ
fa.bahrampour.text: ЩҠШ§ [Ш§ЪҜШұ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ] ШўЩҶЩҮШ§ ШұШ§ ЩҫШіШұШ§ЩҶ ЩҲ ШҜШ®ШӘШұШ§ЩҶ [ЩҮШұ ШҜЩҲ ШұШ§] Щ…ЩүвҖҢШҜЩҮШҜШҢ ЩҲ ЩҮШұ ЩғЩҮ ШұШ§ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ ЩҶШ§ШІШ§ Щ…ЩүвҖҢЩғЩҶШҜ. ШЁЩҮ ШұШ§ШіШӘЩү Ш§ЩҲ ШҜШ§ЩҶШ§Щү ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҶШ§ШіШӘ

segments: ЩҠШ§ ШўЩҶЩҮШ§ ШұШ§ ЩҫШіШұ[Ш§ЩҶвҖҢ] ЩҲ ШҜШ®ШӘШұ[Ш§ЩҶЩүвҖҢ] ШӘЩҲШЈЩ… ШЁШ§ ЩҠЩғШҜЩҠЪҜШұ Щ…ЩүвҖҢЪҜШұШҜШ§ЩҶШҜШҢ ЩҲ ЩҮШұ ЩғЩҮ ШұШ§ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ Ш№ЩӮЩҠЩ… Щ…ЩүвҖҢШіШ§ШІШҜ. Ш§ЩҲШіШӘ ШҜШ§ЩҶШ§Щү ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҶШ§.
fa.fooladvand.text: ЩҠШ§ ШўЩҶЩҮШ§ ШұШ§ ЩҫШіШұ[Ш§ЩҶвҖҢ] ЩҲ ШҜШ®ШӘШұ[Ш§ЩҶЩүвҖҢ] ШӘЩҲШЈЩ… ШЁШ§ ЩҠЩғШҜЩҠЪҜШұ Щ…ЩүвҖҢЪҜШұШҜШ§ЩҶШҜШҢ ЩҲ ЩҮШұ ЩғЩҮ ШұШ§ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ Ш№ЩӮЩҠЩ… Щ…ЩүвҖҢШіШ§ШІШҜ. Ш§ЩҲШіШӘ ШҜШ§ЩҶШ§Щү ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҶШ§.

segments: ЫҢШ§ ШҜШұ ЫҢЪ© ШұШӯЩ… ЩҒШұШІЩҶШҜШ§ЩҶ ЩҫШіШұ ЩҲ ШҜШ®ШӘШұ ЩӮШұШ§Шұ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШҜЩҮШҜШҢ ЩҲ ЩҮШұ Ъ©ЩҮ ШұШ§ Ш®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ Ш№ЩӮЫҢЩ… (ЩҶШ§ШІШ§) Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪҜШұШҜШ§ЩҶШҜШҢ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ (ШЁЩҮ ШөЩ„Ш§Шӯ Ш®Щ„ЩӮ) ШҜШ§ЩҶШ§ ЩҲ (ШЁЩҮ ЩҮШұ ЪҶЩҮ Ш®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ) ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҶШ§ШіШӘ.
fa.ghomshei.text: ЫҢШ§ ШҜШұ ЫҢЪ© ШұШӯЩ… ЩҒШұШІЩҶШҜШ§ЩҶ ЩҫШіШұ ЩҲ ШҜШ®ШӘШұ ЩӮШұШ§Шұ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШҜЩҮШҜШҢ ЩҲ ЩҮШұ Ъ©ЩҮ ШұШ§ Ш®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ Ш№ЩӮЫҢЩ… (ЩҶШ§ШІШ§) Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪҜШұШҜШ§ЩҶШҜШҢ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ (ШЁЩҮ ШөЩ„Ш§Шӯ Ш®Щ„ЩӮ) ШҜШ§ЩҶШ§ ЩҲ (ШЁЩҮ ЩҮШұ ЪҶЩҮ Ш®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ) ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҶШ§ШіШӘ.

segments: ЩҲ ЫҢШ§ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ Ъ©ЩҮ ЩҮЩ… ЩҫШіШұШ§ЩҶ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШҜЩҮШҜ ЩҲ ЩҮЩ… ШҜШ®ШӘШұШ§ЩҶ. ЩҲ Ш®ШҜШ§ ЩҮШұ Ъ©ЩҮ ШұШ§ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ ЩҶШ§ШІШ§ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪ©ЩҶШҜ. Ш§ЩҲ ШЁШі ШўЪҜШ§ЩҮ ЩҲ ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҶШ§ Ш§ШіШӘ. [[В«ЫҢЩҸШІЩҺЩҲЩҗЩ‘Ш¬ЩҸЩҮЩҸЩ…Щ’В»: ШўЩҶЩҮШ§ ШұШ§ ШЁШ§ ЩҮЩ… ЪҜШұШҜ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШўЩҲШұШҜ ЩҲ Ш¬ЩҒШӘ ЩҮЩ… Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪ©ЩҶШҜ. ЫҢШ№ЩҶЫҢ ШЁЩҮ ШЁШұШ®ЫҢЩҮШ§ ЪҜШ§ЩҮЫҢ ЩҫШіШұ ЩҲ ЪҜШ§ЩҮЫҢ ШҜШ®ШӘШұ Ш№Ш·Ш§ШЎ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪ©ЩҶШҜ. ЫҢШ§ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ Ъ©ЩҮ ШҜЩҲЩӮЩ„ЩҲЫҢ ЩҫШіШұ ЫҢШ§ ШҜШ®ШӘШұ ЩҲ ЫҢШ§ ЩҫШіШұ ЩҲ ШҜШ®ШӘШұ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШЁШ®ШҙШҜ.]]
fa.khorramdel.text: ЩҲ ЫҢШ§ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ Ъ©ЩҮ ЩҮЩ… ЩҫШіШұШ§ЩҶ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШҜЩҮШҜ ЩҲ ЩҮЩ… ШҜШ®ШӘШұШ§ЩҶ. ЩҲ Ш®ШҜШ§ ЩҮШұ Ъ©ЩҮ ШұШ§ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ ЩҶШ§ШІШ§ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪ©ЩҶШҜ. Ш§ЩҲ ШЁШі ШўЪҜШ§ЩҮ ЩҲ ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҶШ§ Ш§ШіШӘ. [[В«ЫҢЩҸШІЩҺЩҲЩҗЩ‘Ш¬ЩҸЩҮЩҸЩ…Щ’В»: ШўЩҶЩҮШ§ ШұШ§ ШЁШ§ ЩҮЩ… ЪҜШұШҜ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШўЩҲШұШҜ ЩҲ Ш¬ЩҒШӘ ЩҮЩ… Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪ©ЩҶШҜ. ЫҢШ№ЩҶЫҢ ШЁЩҮ ШЁШұШ®ЫҢЩҮШ§ ЪҜШ§ЩҮЫҢ ЩҫШіШұ ЩҲ ЪҜШ§ЩҮЫҢ ШҜШ®ШӘШұ Ш№Ш·Ш§ШЎ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪ©ЩҶШҜ. ЫҢШ§ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ Ъ©ЩҮ ШҜЩҲЩӮЩ„ЩҲЫҢ ЩҫШіШұ ЫҢШ§ ШҜШ®ШӘШұ ЩҲ ЫҢШ§ ЩҫШіШұ ЩҲ ШҜШ®ШӘШұ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШЁШ®ШҙШҜ.]]

segments: ЫҢШ§ ШЁЩҮ ШўЩҶШ§ЩҶ ЩҮЩ… ЩҫШіШұ ЩҲ ЩҮЩ… ШҜШ®ШӘШұ ШҜЩҮШҜШҢ ЩҲ ЩҮШұЪ©Ші ШұШ§ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ ШіШӘШұЩҲЩҶ ЪҜШұШҜШ§ЩҶШҜШҢ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ ШҜШ§ЩҶШ§ЫҢ ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҶШ§ШіШӘвҖҢ
fa.khorramshahi.text: ЫҢШ§ ШЁЩҮ ШўЩҶШ§ЩҶ ЩҮЩ… ЩҫШіШұ ЩҲ ЩҮЩ… ШҜШ®ШӘШұ ШҜЩҮШҜШҢ ЩҲ ЩҮШұЪ©Ші ШұШ§ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ ШіШӘШұЩҲЩҶ ЪҜШұШҜШ§ЩҶШҜШҢ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ ШҜШ§ЩҶШ§ЫҢ ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҶШ§ШіШӘвҖҢ

segments: ЫҢШ§ (Ш§ЪҜШұ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ) ЩҫШіШұ ЩҲ ШҜШ®ШӘШұ -ЩҮШұ ШҜЩҲ- ШұШ§ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШўЩҶШ§ЩҶ Ш¬Щ…Ш№ Щ…ЫҢЪ©ЩҶШҜ ЩҲ ЩҮШұ Ъ©Ші ШұШ§ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ Ш№ЩӮЫҢЩ… Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪҜШ°Ш§ШұШҜШӣ ШІЫҢШұШ§ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ ШҜШ§ЩҶШ§ ЩҲ ЩӮШ§ШҜШұ Ш§ШіШӘ.
fa.makarem.text: ЫҢШ§ (Ш§ЪҜШұ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ) ЩҫШіШұ ЩҲ ШҜШ®ШӘШұ -ЩҮШұ ШҜЩҲ- ШұШ§ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ШўЩҶШ§ЩҶ Ш¬Щ…Ш№ Щ…ЫҢЪ©ЩҶШҜ ЩҲ ЩҮШұ Ъ©Ші ШұШ§ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ Ш№ЩӮЫҢЩ… Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪҜШ°Ш§ШұШҜШӣ ШІЫҢШұШ§ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ ШҜШ§ЩҶШ§ ЩҲ ЩӮШ§ШҜШұ Ш§ШіШӘ.

segments: ЫҢШ§ Ш¬ЩҸЩҒШӘ Ъ©ЩҶШҜШҙШ§ЩҶ ЩҶШұШ§ЩҶЫҢ ЩҲ Щ…Ш§ШҜЪҜШ§ЩҶЫҢ ЩҲ ШЁЪҜШұШҜШ§ЩҶШҜ ЩҮШұ Ъ©ЩҮ ШұШ§ Ш®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ ЩҶШ§ШІШ§ ЩҮЩ…Ш§ЩҶШ§ Ш§ЩҲ Ш§ШіШӘ ШҜШ§ЩҶШ§ЫҢ ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҶШ§
fa.moezzi.text: ЫҢШ§ Ш¬ЩҸЩҒШӘ Ъ©ЩҶШҜШҙШ§ЩҶ ЩҶШұШ§ЩҶЫҢ ЩҲ Щ…Ш§ШҜЪҜШ§ЩҶЫҢ ЩҲ ШЁЪҜШұШҜШ§ЩҶШҜ ЩҮШұ Ъ©ЩҮ ШұШ§ Ш®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ ЩҶШ§ШІШ§ ЩҮЩ…Ш§ЩҶШ§ Ш§ЩҲ Ш§ШіШӘ ШҜШ§ЩҶШ§ЫҢ ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҶШ§

segments: ЩҠШ§ ШўЩҶШ§ЩҶ ШұШ§ ЩҫШіШұШ§ЩҶ ЩҲ ШҜШ®ШӘШұШ§ЩҶ ЩҮШұ ШҜЩҲ Щ…ЩүвҖҢШҜЩҮШҜШҢ ЩҲ ЩҮШұ ЩғЩҮ ШұШ§ Ш®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ ЩҶШ§ШІШ§ ЩҲ ШЁЩүвҖҢЩҒШұШІЩҶШҜ Щ…ЩүвҖҢЪҜШұШҜШ§ЩҶШҜШҢ ЩғЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ ШҜШ§ЩҶШ§ ЩҲ ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҶШ§ШіШӘ.
fa.mojtabavi.text: ЩҠШ§ ШўЩҶШ§ЩҶ ШұШ§ ЩҫШіШұШ§ЩҶ ЩҲ ШҜШ®ШӘШұШ§ЩҶ ЩҮШұ ШҜЩҲ Щ…ЩүвҖҢШҜЩҮШҜШҢ ЩҲ ЩҮШұ ЩғЩҮ ШұШ§ Ш®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ ЩҶШ§ШІШ§ ЩҲ ШЁЩүвҖҢЩҒШұШІЩҶШҜ Щ…ЩүвҖҢЪҜШұШҜШ§ЩҶШҜШҢ ЩғЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ ШҜШ§ЩҶШ§ ЩҲ ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҶШ§ШіШӘ.

segments: ЫҢШ§ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢШҙШ§ЩҶ ЩҫШіШұШ§ЩҶ ЩҲ ШҜШ®ШӘШұШ§ЩҶЫҢ (ШӘЩҲШЈЩ…Ш§ЩҶ) ШЁШ§ ЫҢЪ©ШҜЫҢЪҜШұ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪҜШұШҜШ§ЩҶШҜ ЩҲ ЩҮШұ Ъ©ЩҮ ШұШ§ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ Ш№ЩӮЫҢЩ… Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШіШ§ШІШҜ ЩҲ ЩҮЩ…ЩҲШ§ШұЩҮ Ш§ЩҲШіШӘ ШЁШіЫҢ ШҜШ§ЩҶШ§ЫҢ ШЁШіЫҢШ§Шұ ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҶШ§.
fa.sadeqi.text: ЫҢШ§ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢШҙШ§ЩҶ ЩҫШіШұШ§ЩҶ ЩҲ ШҜШ®ШӘШұШ§ЩҶЫҢ (ШӘЩҲШЈЩ…Ш§ЩҶ) ШЁШ§ ЫҢЪ©ШҜЫҢЪҜШұ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪҜШұШҜШ§ЩҶШҜ ЩҲ ЩҮШұ Ъ©ЩҮ ШұШ§ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ Ш№ЩӮЫҢЩ… Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШіШ§ШІШҜ ЩҲ ЩҮЩ…ЩҲШ§ШұЩҮ Ш§ЩҲШіШӘ ШЁШіЫҢ ШҜШ§ЩҶШ§ЫҢ ШЁШіЫҢШ§Шұ ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҶШ§.

segments: ЩҲЩҺ Щ…ЩҺШ§ Ъ©ЩҺШ§ЩҶЩҺвҖҢ Щ„ЩҗШЁЩҺШҙЩҺШұЩҚ ШЈЩҺЩҶЩ’вҖҢ ЩҠЩҸЪ©ЩҺЩ„Щ‘ЩҗЩ…ЩҺЩҮЩҸвҖҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„Щ‘ЩҺЩҮЩҸвҖҢ ШҘЩҗЩ„Ш§Щ‘ЩҺ ЩҲЩҺШӯЩ’ЩҠШ§ЩӢ ШЈЩҺЩҲЩ’ Щ…ЩҗЩҶЩ’вҖҢ ЩҲЩҺШұЩҺШ§ШЎЩҗ ШӯЩҗШ¬ЩҺШ§ШЁЩҚвҖҢ ШЈЩҺЩҲЩ’ ЩҠЩҸШұЩ’ШіЩҗЩ„ЩҺвҖҢ ШұЩҺШіЩҸЩҲЩ„Ш§ЩӢ ЩҒЩҺЩҠЩҸЩҲШӯЩҗЩҠЩҺвҖҢ ШЁЩҗШҘЩҗШ°Щ’ЩҶЩҗЩҮЩҗвҖҢ Щ…ЩҺШ§ ЩҠЩҺШҙЩҺШ§ШЎЩҸ ШҘЩҗЩҶЩ‘ЩҺЩҮЩҸвҖҢ Ш№ЩҺЩ„ЩҗЩҠЩҢвҖҢ ШӯЩҺЪ©ЩҗЩҠЩ…ЩҢвҖҢ
arabic.text: ЩҲЩҺ Щ…ЩҺШ§ Ъ©ЩҺШ§ЩҶЩҺвҖҢ Щ„ЩҗШЁЩҺШҙЩҺШұЩҚ ШЈЩҺЩҶЩ’вҖҢ ЩҠЩҸЪ©ЩҺЩ„Щ‘ЩҗЩ…ЩҺЩҮЩҸвҖҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„Щ‘ЩҺЩҮЩҸвҖҢ ШҘЩҗЩ„Ш§Щ‘ЩҺ ЩҲЩҺШӯЩ’ЩҠШ§ЩӢ ШЈЩҺЩҲЩ’ Щ…ЩҗЩҶЩ’вҖҢ ЩҲЩҺШұЩҺШ§ШЎЩҗ ШӯЩҗШ¬ЩҺШ§ШЁЩҚвҖҢ ШЈЩҺЩҲЩ’ ЩҠЩҸШұЩ’ШіЩҗЩ„ЩҺвҖҢ ШұЩҺШіЩҸЩҲЩ„Ш§ЩӢ ЩҒЩҺЩҠЩҸЩҲШӯЩҗЩҠЩҺвҖҢ ШЁЩҗШҘЩҗШ°Щ’ЩҶЩҗЩҮЩҗвҖҢ Щ…ЩҺШ§ ЩҠЩҺШҙЩҺШ§ШЎЩҸ ШҘЩҗЩҶЩ‘ЩҺЩҮЩҸвҖҢ Ш№ЩҺЩ„ЩҗЩҠЩҢвҖҢ ШӯЩҺЪ©ЩҗЩҠЩ…ЩҢвҖҢ

segments: It is not given to man that God should speak to him except by suggestion or indirectly, or send a messenger to convey by His command whatsoever He please. He is all-high and all-wise.
en.ahmedali.text: It is not given to man that God should speak to him except by suggestion or indirectly, or send a messenger to convey by His command whatsoever He please. He is all-high and all-wise.

segments: And it is not for any human that Allah may speak to him except as a divine revelation or while the human is on this side of the veil of greatness, or that He sends an angel to reveal by His permission, whatever He wills; indeed He is Supreme, Wise.
en.ahmedraza.text: And it is not for any human that Allah may speak to him except as a divine revelation or while the human is on this side of the veil of greatness, or that He sends an angel to reveal by His permission, whatever He wills; indeed He is Supreme, Wise.

segments: It belongs not to any mortal that God should speak to him, except by revelation, or from behind a veil, or that He should send a messenger and he reveal whatsoever He will, by His leave; surely He is All-high, All-wise.
en.arberry.text: It belongs not to any mortal that God should speak to him, except by revelation, or from behind a veil, or that He should send a messenger and he reveal whatsoever He will, by His leave; surely He is All-high, All-wise.

segments: And it is not Possible for a human being that Allah should speak Unto him otherwise than by revelation or from behind a veil, or that He sendeth a messenger, so that he revealeth by His command whatsoever He will; verily He is Exalted, Wise.
en.daryabadi.text: And it is not Possible for a human being that Allah should speak Unto him otherwise than by revelation or from behind a veil, or that He sendeth a messenger, so that he revealeth by His command whatsoever He will; verily He is Exalted, Wise.

segments: It is not given to any human being that Allah should speak to him unless (it be) by Inspiration, or from behind a veil, or (that) He sends a Messenger to reveal what He wills by His Leave. Verily, He is Most High, Most Wise.
en.hilali.text: It is not given to any human being that Allah should speak to him unless (it be) by Inspiration, or from behind a veil, or (that) He sends a Messenger to reveal what He wills by His Leave. Verily, He is Most High, Most Wise.

segments: It is not for any human that God should speak to him, except by inspiration, or from behind a veil, or by sending a messenger to reveal by His permission whatever He wills. He is All-High, All-Wise.
en.itani.text: It is not for any human that God should speak to him, except by inspiration, or from behind a veil, or by sending a messenger to reveal by His permission whatever He wills. He is All-High, All-Wise.

segments: It is not given to any human being that Allah should speak to him except through revelation, or from behind a veil, or that a messenger (an angel) be sent to him who reveals to him by Allah's leave whatever He wishes. He is All-High, Most Wise.
en.maududi.text: It is not given to any human being that Allah should speak to him except through revelation, or from behind a veil, or that a messenger (an angel) be sent to him who reveals to him by Allah's leave whatever He wishes. He is All-High, Most Wise.

segments: It is not given to any human being that Allah should speak to him unless (it be) by revelation, or from behind a veil, or (that) He sends a Messenger to reveal what He wills by His leave. Verily, He is Most High, Most Wise.
en.mubarakpuri.text: It is not given to any human being that Allah should speak to him unless (it be) by revelation, or from behind a veil, or (that) He sends a Messenger to reveal what He wills by His leave. Verily, He is Most High, Most Wise.

segments: And it was not (vouchsafed) to any mortal that Allah should speak to him unless (it be) by revelation or from behind a veil, or (that) He sendeth a messenger to reveal what He will by His leave. Lo! He is Exalted, Wise.
en.pickthall.text: And it was not (vouchsafed) to any mortal that Allah should speak to him unless (it be) by revelation or from behind a veil, or (that) He sendeth a messenger to reveal what He will by His leave. Lo! He is Exalted, Wise.

segments: It is not [possible] for any human that Allah should speak to him except through revelation or from behind a veil, or send a messenger who reveals by His permission whatever He wishes. Indeed He is all-exalted, all-wise.
en.qarai.text: It is not [possible] for any human that Allah should speak to him except through revelation or from behind a veil, or send a messenger who reveals by His permission whatever He wishes. Indeed He is all-exalted, all-wise.

segments: It does not belong to any human that Allah should speak to him except by Revelation, or from behind a veil, or that He sent a Messenger to revealwhatsoever He will by His Permission. He is the High, the Wise.
en.qaribullah.text: It does not belong to any human that Allah should speak to him except by Revelation, or from behind a veil, or that He sent a Messenger to revealwhatsoever He will by His Permission. He is the High, the Wise.

segments: And it is not for any human being that Allah should speak to him except by revelation or from behind a partition or that He sends a messenger to reveal, by His permission, what He wills. Indeed, He is Most High and Wise.
en.sahih.text: And it is not for any human being that Allah should speak to him except by revelation or from behind a partition or that He sends a messenger to reveal, by His permission, what He wills. Indeed, He is Most High and Wise.

segments: To no mortal does God speak but through revelation, from behind a curtain, or by sending a Messenger who reveals, by His permission whatever He pleases. He is the Most High and the All-wise.
en.sarwar.text: To no mortal does God speak but through revelation, from behind a curtain, or by sending a Messenger who reveals, by His permission whatever He pleases. He is the Most High and the All-wise.

segments: And it is not for any mortal that Allah should speak to him except by revelation or from behind a veil, or by sending a messenger and revealing by His permission what He pleases; surely He is High, Wise.
en.shakir.text: And it is not for any mortal that Allah should speak to him except by revelation or from behind a veil, or by sending a messenger and revealing by His permission what He pleases; surely He is High, Wise.

segments: Wama kana libasharin an yukallimahu Allahu illa wahyan aw min warai hijabin aw yursila rasoolan fayoohiya biithnihi ma yashao innahu AAaliyyun hakeemun
en.transliteration.text: Wama kana libasharin an yukallimahu Allahu illa wahyan aw min warai hijabin aw yursila rasoolan fayoohiya biithnihi ma yashao innahu AAaliyyun hakeemun

segments: It is not granted to any human being that God should speak to him other than by revelation or from behind a veil, or by sending him a messenger, so that the messenger may reveal, by His command, whatsoever He will. Truly, He is exalted and wise.
en.wahiduddin.text: It is not granted to any human being that God should speak to him other than by revelation or from behind a veil, or by sending him a messenger, so that the messenger may reveal, by His command, whatsoever He will. Truly, He is exalted and wise.

segments: It is not fitting for a man that Allah should speak to him except by inspiration, or from behind a veil, or by the sending of a messenger to reveal, with Allah's permission, what Allah wills: for He is Most High, Most Wise.
en.yusufali.text: It is not fitting for a man that Allah should speak to him except by inspiration, or from behind a veil, or by the sending of a messenger to reveal, with Allah's permission, what Allah wills: for He is Most High, Most Wise.

segments: ЩҮЫҢЪҶ ШЁШҙШұЫҢ ШұШ§ ЩҶШіШІШҜ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШЁШ§ Ш§ЩҲ ШіШ®ЩҶ ЪҜЩҲЫҢШҜШҢ Щ…ЪҜШұ Ш§ШІ ШұШ§ЩҮ ЩҲШӯЫҢ ЫҢШ§ Ш§ШІ ЩҫШҙШӘ ШӯШ¬Ш§ШЁ ШәЫҢШЁ ЫҢШ§ ШұШіЩҲЩ„ЫҢ [ЪҶЩҲЩҶ ЩҒШұШҙШӘЩҮ] Щ…ЫҢ ЩҒШұШіШӘШҜШӣ ЩҫШі ЩҒШұШҙШӘЩҮ ШЁЩҮ Ш§Ш°ЩҶ Ш§ЩҲ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШұШ§ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ ЩҲШӯЫҢ Щ…ЫҢ Ъ©ЩҶШҜШӣ ЫҢЩӮЫҢЩҶШ§ЩӢ Ш§ЩҲ ШЁЩ„ЩҶШҜ Щ…ШұШӘШЁЩҮ ЩҲ ШӯЪ©ЫҢЩ… Ш§ШіШӘ.
fa.ansarian.text: ЩҮЫҢЪҶ ШЁШҙШұЫҢ ШұШ§ ЩҶШіШІШҜ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШЁШ§ Ш§ЩҲ ШіШ®ЩҶ ЪҜЩҲЫҢШҜШҢ Щ…ЪҜШұ Ш§ШІ ШұШ§ЩҮ ЩҲШӯЫҢ ЫҢШ§ Ш§ШІ ЩҫШҙШӘ ШӯШ¬Ш§ШЁ ШәЫҢШЁ ЫҢШ§ ШұШіЩҲЩ„ЫҢ [ЪҶЩҲЩҶ ЩҒШұШҙШӘЩҮ] Щ…ЫҢ ЩҒШұШіШӘШҜШӣ ЩҫШі ЩҒШұШҙШӘЩҮ ШЁЩҮ Ш§Ш°ЩҶ Ш§ЩҲ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШұШ§ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ ЩҲШӯЫҢ Щ…ЫҢ Ъ©ЩҶШҜШӣ ЫҢЩӮЫҢЩҶШ§ЩӢ Ш§ЩҲ ШЁЩ„ЩҶШҜ Щ…ШұШӘШЁЩҮ ЩҲ ШӯЪ©ЫҢЩ… Ш§ШіШӘ.

segments: ЩҮЩҠЪҶ ШЁШҙШұЩү ШұШ§ ЩҶШұШіШҜ ЩғЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ Ш¬ШІ ШЁЩҮ ЩҲШӯЩү ЩҠШ§ Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶ ШіЩҲЩү ЩҫШұШҜЩҮШҢ ШЁШ§ Ш§ЩҲ ШіШ®ЩҶ ЪҜЩҲЩҠШҜ. ЩҠШ§ ЩҒШұШҙШӘЩҮвҖҢШ§Щү Щ…ЩүвҖҢЩҒШұШіШӘШҜ ШӘШ§ ШЁЩҮ ЩҒШұЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш§ЩҲ ЩҮШұ ЪҶЩҮ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ ШЁЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ ЩҲШӯЩү ЩғЩҶШҜ. Ш§ЩҲ ШЁЩ„ЩҶШҜ ЩҫШ§ЩҠЩҮ ЩҲ ШӯЩғЩҠЩ… Ш§ШіШӘ.
fa.ayati.text: ЩҮЩҠЪҶ ШЁШҙШұЩү ШұШ§ ЩҶШұШіШҜ ЩғЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ Ш¬ШІ ШЁЩҮ ЩҲШӯЩү ЩҠШ§ Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶ ШіЩҲЩү ЩҫШұШҜЩҮШҢ ШЁШ§ Ш§ЩҲ ШіШ®ЩҶ ЪҜЩҲЩҠШҜ. ЩҠШ§ ЩҒШұШҙШӘЩҮвҖҢШ§Щү Щ…ЩүвҖҢЩҒШұШіШӘШҜ ШӘШ§ ШЁЩҮ ЩҒШұЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш§ЩҲ ЩҮШұ ЪҶЩҮ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ ШЁЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ ЩҲШӯЩү ЩғЩҶШҜ. Ш§ЩҲ ШЁЩ„ЩҶШҜ ЩҫШ§ЩҠЩҮ ЩҲ ШӯЩғЩҠЩ… Ш§ШіШӘ.

segments: ЩҲ ЩҮЩҠЪҶ ШЁШҙШұЩү ШұШ§ ЩҶШұШіШҜ ЩғЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШЁШ§ Ш§ЩҲ ШіШ®ЩҶ ШЁЪҜЩҲЩҠШҜ Ш¬ШІ [Ш§ШІ ШұШ§ЩҮвҖҢ] ЩҲШӯЩү ЩҠШ§ Ш§ШІ ЩҒШұШ§ШіЩҲЩү ШӯШ¬Ш§ШЁЩүШҢ ЩҠШ§ ШұШіЩҲЩ„Щү ШЁЩҒШұШіШӘШҜ ЩғЩҮ ШЁЩҮ Ш§Ш°ЩҶ Ш§ЩҲ ЩҮШұ ЪҶЩҮ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ ЩҲШӯЩү ЩғЩҶШҜ. ЩҮЩ…Ш§ЩҶШ§ Ш§ЩҲ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш§ Щ…ЩӮШ§Щ… ШӯЩғЩҠЩ… Ш§ШіШӘ
fa.bahrampour.text: ЩҲ ЩҮЩҠЪҶ ШЁШҙШұЩү ШұШ§ ЩҶШұШіШҜ ЩғЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШЁШ§ Ш§ЩҲ ШіШ®ЩҶ ШЁЪҜЩҲЩҠШҜ Ш¬ШІ [Ш§ШІ ШұШ§ЩҮвҖҢ] ЩҲШӯЩү ЩҠШ§ Ш§ШІ ЩҒШұШ§ШіЩҲЩү ШӯШ¬Ш§ШЁЩүШҢ ЩҠШ§ ШұШіЩҲЩ„Щү ШЁЩҒШұШіШӘШҜ ЩғЩҮ ШЁЩҮ Ш§Ш°ЩҶ Ш§ЩҲ ЩҮШұ ЪҶЩҮ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ ЩҲШӯЩү ЩғЩҶШҜ. ЩҮЩ…Ш§ЩҶШ§ Ш§ЩҲ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш§ Щ…ЩӮШ§Щ… ШӯЩғЩҠЩ… Ш§ШіШӘ

segments: ЩҲ ЩҮЩҠЪҶ ШЁШҙШұЩү ШұШ§ ЩҶШұШіШҜ ЩғЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШЁШ§ Ш§ЩҲ ШіШ®ЩҶ ЪҜЩҲЩҠШҜ Ш¬ШІ [Ш§ШІ ШұШ§ЩҮвҖҢ] ЩҲШӯЩү ЩҠШ§ Ш§ШІ ЩҒШұШ§ШіЩҲЩү ШӯШ¬Ш§ШЁЩүШҢ ЩҠШ§ ЩҒШұШіШӘШ§ШҜЩҮвҖҢШ§Щү ШЁЩҒШұШіШӘШҜ ЩҲ ШЁЩҮ Ш§Ш°ЩҶ Ш§ЩҲ ЩҮШұ ЪҶЩҮ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ ЩҲШӯЩү ЩҶЩ…Ш§ЩҠШҜ. ШўШұЩүШҢ Ш§ЩҲШіШӘ ШЁЩ„ЩҶШҜЩ…ШұШӘШЁЩҮ ШіЩҶШ¬ЩҠШҜЩҮвҖҢЩғШ§Шұ.
fa.fooladvand.text: ЩҲ ЩҮЩҠЪҶ ШЁШҙШұЩү ШұШ§ ЩҶШұШіШҜ ЩғЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШЁШ§ Ш§ЩҲ ШіШ®ЩҶ ЪҜЩҲЩҠШҜ Ш¬ШІ [Ш§ШІ ШұШ§ЩҮвҖҢ] ЩҲШӯЩү ЩҠШ§ Ш§ШІ ЩҒШұШ§ШіЩҲЩү ШӯШ¬Ш§ШЁЩүШҢ ЩҠШ§ ЩҒШұШіШӘШ§ШҜЩҮвҖҢШ§Щү ШЁЩҒШұШіШӘШҜ ЩҲ ШЁЩҮ Ш§Ш°ЩҶ Ш§ЩҲ ЩҮШұ ЪҶЩҮ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ ЩҲШӯЩү ЩҶЩ…Ш§ЩҠШҜ. ШўШұЩүШҢ Ш§ЩҲШіШӘ ШЁЩ„ЩҶШҜЩ…ШұШӘШЁЩҮ ШіЩҶШ¬ЩҠШҜЩҮвҖҢЩғШ§Шұ.

segments: ЩҲ ЩҮЫҢЪҶ ШЁШҙШұЫҢ ШұШ§ ЫҢШ§ШұШ§ЫҢ ШўЩҶ ЩҶШЁШ§ШҙШҜ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШЁШ§ Ш§ЩҲ ШіШ®ЩҶ ЪҜЩҲЫҢШҜ Щ…ЪҜШұ ШЁЩҮ ЩҲШӯЫҢ (ЩҲ Ш§Щ„ЩҮШ§Щ… Ш®ШҜШ§) ЫҢШ§ Ш§ШІ ЩҫШі ЩҫШұШҜЩҮ ШәЫҢШЁ Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ… (ЩҲ ШӯШ¬Ш§ШЁ Щ…Щ„Ъ©ЩҲШӘ Ш¬ЩҮШ§ЩҶ) ЫҢШ§ ШұШіЩҲЩ„ЫҢ (Ш§ШІ ЩҒШұШҙШӘЪҜШ§ЩҶ Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ… ШЁШ§Щ„Ш§) ЩҒШұШіШӘШҜ ШӘШ§ ШЁЩҮ Ш§Щ…Шұ Ш®ШҜШ§ ЩҮШұ ЪҶЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ Ш®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ ЩҲШӯЫҢ Ъ©ЩҶШҜШҢ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ Ш®ШҜШ§ЫҢ ШЁЩ„ЩҶШҜ Щ…ШұШӘШЁЩҮ ШӯЪ©ЫҢЩ… Ш§ШіШӘ.
fa.ghomshei.text: ЩҲ ЩҮЫҢЪҶ ШЁШҙШұЫҢ ШұШ§ ЫҢШ§ШұШ§ЫҢ ШўЩҶ ЩҶШЁШ§ШҙШҜ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШЁШ§ Ш§ЩҲ ШіШ®ЩҶ ЪҜЩҲЫҢШҜ Щ…ЪҜШұ ШЁЩҮ ЩҲШӯЫҢ (ЩҲ Ш§Щ„ЩҮШ§Щ… Ш®ШҜШ§) ЫҢШ§ Ш§ШІ ЩҫШі ЩҫШұШҜЩҮ ШәЫҢШЁ Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ… (ЩҲ ШӯШ¬Ш§ШЁ Щ…Щ„Ъ©ЩҲШӘ Ш¬ЩҮШ§ЩҶ) ЫҢШ§ ШұШіЩҲЩ„ЫҢ (Ш§ШІ ЩҒШұШҙШӘЪҜШ§ЩҶ Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ… ШЁШ§Щ„Ш§) ЩҒШұШіШӘШҜ ШӘШ§ ШЁЩҮ Ш§Щ…Шұ Ш®ШҜШ§ ЩҮШұ ЪҶЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ Ш®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ ЩҲШӯЫҢ Ъ©ЩҶШҜШҢ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ Ш®ШҜШ§ЫҢ ШЁЩ„ЩҶШҜ Щ…ШұШӘШЁЩҮ ШӯЪ©ЫҢЩ… Ш§ШіШӘ.

segments: ЩҮЫҢЪҶ Ш§ЩҶШіШ§ЩҶЫҢ ШұШ§ ЩҶШіШІШҜ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШЁШ§ Ш§ЩҲ ШіШ®ЩҶ ШЁЪҜЩҲЫҢШҜШҢ Щ…ЪҜШұ Ш§ШІ Ш·ШұЫҢЩӮ ЩҲШӯЫҢ (ШЁЩҮ ЩӮЩ„ШЁШҢ ШЁЩҮ ЪҜЩҲЩҶЩҮвҖҢЫҢ Ш§Щ„ЩҮШ§Щ… ШҜШұ ШЁЫҢШҜШ§ШұЫҢШҢ ЩҲ ЫҢШ§ Ш®ЩҲШ§ШЁ ШҜШұ ШәЫҢШұШЁЫҢШҜШ§ШұЫҢ) ЫҢШ§ Ш§ШІ ЩҫШі ЩҫШұШҜЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢ (Ш§ШІ Щ…ЩҲШ§ЩҶШ№ Ш·ШЁЫҢШ№ЫҢ) ЩҲ ЫҢШ§ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ЩҲЩҶШҜ ЩӮШ§ШөШҜЫҢ ШұШ§ (ШЁЩҮ ЩҶШ§Щ… Ш¬ШЁШұШҰЫҢЩ„) ШЁЩҒШұШіШӘШҜ ЩҲ Ш§ЩҲ ШЁЩҮ ЩҒШұЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШўЩҒШұЫҢШҜЪҜШ§Шұ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШұШ§ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ (ШЁЩҮ ЩҫЫҢШәЩ…ШЁШұШ§ЩҶ) ЩҲШӯЫҢ Ъ©ЩҶШҜ. ЩҲЫҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш§ ЩҲ Ъ©Ш§Шұ ШЁШ¬Ш§ Ш§ШіШӘ. [[В«Щ…ЩҺШ§ Ъ©ЩҺШ§ЩҶЩҺ Щ„ЩҗШЁЩҺШҙЩҺШұЩҚ ...В»: Ш§ШұШӘШЁШ§Ш· Ш®ШҜШ§ ШЁШ§ Ш¬ЩҮШ§ЩҶ Ш§ЩҶШіШ§ЩҶЫҢЩ‘ШӘШҢ Ш§ШІ ШіЩҮ ШұШ§ЩҮ Ш§Щ…Ъ©Ш§ЩҶвҖҢЩҫШ°ЫҢШұ Ш§ШіШӘ ЩҲ ШЁШі: Ш§Щ„ЩҒ - ЩҲШӯЫҢШҢ ЫҢШ§ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШ§ЫҢ ШЁЩҮ ЩӮЩ„ШЁШҢ ШЁЩҮ ЪҜЩҲЩҶЩҮ Ш§Щ„ЩҮШ§Щ… ШҜШұ ШЁЫҢШҜШ§ШұЫҢ ЫҢШ§ ШЁЩҮ ШөЩҲШұШӘ Ш®ЩҲШ§ШЁ ШҜШұ ЩҲЩӮШӘ Ш®ЩҒШӘЩҶ (ЩҶЪҜШ§: ЩӮШөШө / 7). ШЁ - Ш§ШІ ЩҫШҙШӘ ШӯШ¬Ш§ШЁ (ЩҶЪҜШ§: ЩӮШөШө / 30 - 42). Ш¬ - Ш§ШұШіШ§Щ„ ЩҒШұШҙШӘЩҮ ЩҲШӯЫҢ ШЁЩҮ ШіЩҲЫҢ ЩҫЫҢШәЩ…ШЁШұШ§ЩҶ (ЩҶЪҜШ§: ЩҶШіШ§ШЎ / 163).]]
fa.khorramdel.text: ЩҮЫҢЪҶ Ш§ЩҶШіШ§ЩҶЫҢ ШұШ§ ЩҶШіШІШҜ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШЁШ§ Ш§ЩҲ ШіШ®ЩҶ ШЁЪҜЩҲЫҢШҜШҢ Щ…ЪҜШұ Ш§ШІ Ш·ШұЫҢЩӮ ЩҲШӯЫҢ (ШЁЩҮ ЩӮЩ„ШЁШҢ ШЁЩҮ ЪҜЩҲЩҶЩҮвҖҢЫҢ Ш§Щ„ЩҮШ§Щ… ШҜШұ ШЁЫҢШҜШ§ШұЫҢШҢ ЩҲ ЫҢШ§ Ш®ЩҲШ§ШЁ ШҜШұ ШәЫҢШұШЁЫҢШҜШ§ШұЫҢ) ЫҢШ§ Ш§ШІ ЩҫШі ЩҫШұШҜЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢ (Ш§ШІ Щ…ЩҲШ§ЩҶШ№ Ш·ШЁЫҢШ№ЫҢ) ЩҲ ЫҢШ§ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ЩҲЩҶШҜ ЩӮШ§ШөШҜЫҢ ШұШ§ (ШЁЩҮ ЩҶШ§Щ… Ш¬ШЁШұШҰЫҢЩ„) ШЁЩҒШұШіШӘШҜ ЩҲ Ш§ЩҲ ШЁЩҮ ЩҒШұЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШўЩҒШұЫҢШҜЪҜШ§Шұ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШұШ§ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ (ШЁЩҮ ЩҫЫҢШәЩ…ШЁШұШ§ЩҶ) ЩҲШӯЫҢ Ъ©ЩҶШҜ. ЩҲЫҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш§ ЩҲ Ъ©Ш§Шұ ШЁШ¬Ш§ Ш§ШіШӘ. [[В«Щ…ЩҺШ§ Ъ©ЩҺШ§ЩҶЩҺ Щ„ЩҗШЁЩҺШҙЩҺШұЩҚ ...В»: Ш§ШұШӘШЁШ§Ш· Ш®ШҜШ§ ШЁШ§ Ш¬ЩҮШ§ЩҶ Ш§ЩҶШіШ§ЩҶЫҢЩ‘ШӘШҢ Ш§ШІ ШіЩҮ ШұШ§ЩҮ Ш§Щ…Ъ©Ш§ЩҶвҖҢЩҫШ°ЫҢШұ Ш§ШіШӘ ЩҲ ШЁШі: Ш§Щ„ЩҒ - ЩҲШӯЫҢШҢ ЫҢШ§ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШ§ЫҢ ШЁЩҮ ЩӮЩ„ШЁШҢ ШЁЩҮ ЪҜЩҲЩҶЩҮ Ш§Щ„ЩҮШ§Щ… ШҜШұ ШЁЫҢШҜШ§ШұЫҢ ЫҢШ§ ШЁЩҮ ШөЩҲШұШӘ Ш®ЩҲШ§ШЁ ШҜШұ ЩҲЩӮШӘ Ш®ЩҒШӘЩҶ (ЩҶЪҜШ§: ЩӮШөШө / 7). ШЁ - Ш§ШІ ЩҫШҙШӘ ШӯШ¬Ш§ШЁ (ЩҶЪҜШ§: ЩӮШөШө / 30 - 42). Ш¬ - Ш§ШұШіШ§Щ„ ЩҒШұШҙШӘЩҮ ЩҲШӯЫҢ ШЁЩҮ ШіЩҲЫҢ ЩҫЫҢШәЩ…ШЁШұШ§ЩҶ (ЩҶЪҜШ§: ЩҶШіШ§ШЎ / 163).]]

segments: ЩҲ ЩҮЫҢЪҶ ШЁШҙШұЫҢ ШұШ§ ЩҶШұШіШҜ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ЩҲЩҶШҜ ШЁШ§ Ш§ЩҲ ШіШ®ЩҶ ЪҜЩҲЫҢШҜ Щ…ЪҜШұ Ш§ШІ ШұШ§ЩҮ ЩҲШӯЫҢШҢ ЫҢШ§ Ш§ШІ ЩҫШҙШӘ ЩҫШұШҜЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢШҢ ЫҢШ§ ЩҒШұШҙШӘЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢ ШЁЩҒШұШіШӘШҜ ЩҲ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ ШЁЩҮ Ш§Ш°ЩҶ Ш®ЩҲЫҢШҙ ЩҲШӯЫҢ Ъ©ЩҶШҜ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ ШЁЩ„ЩҶШҜЩ…ШұШӘШЁЩҮ ЩҒШұШІШ§ЩҶЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘвҖҢ
fa.khorramshahi.text: ЩҲ ЩҮЫҢЪҶ ШЁШҙШұЫҢ ШұШ§ ЩҶШұШіШҜ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ЩҲЩҶШҜ ШЁШ§ Ш§ЩҲ ШіШ®ЩҶ ЪҜЩҲЫҢШҜ Щ…ЪҜШұ Ш§ШІ ШұШ§ЩҮ ЩҲШӯЫҢШҢ ЫҢШ§ Ш§ШІ ЩҫШҙШӘ ЩҫШұШҜЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢШҢ ЫҢШ§ ЩҒШұШҙШӘЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢ ШЁЩҒШұШіШӘШҜ ЩҲ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ ШЁЩҮ Ш§Ш°ЩҶ Ш®ЩҲЫҢШҙ ЩҲШӯЫҢ Ъ©ЩҶШҜ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ ШЁЩ„ЩҶШҜЩ…ШұШӘШЁЩҮ ЩҒШұШІШ§ЩҶЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘвҖҢ

segments: ЩҲ ШҙШ§ЫҢШіШӘЩҮ ЩҮЫҢЪҶ Ш§ЩҶШіШ§ЩҶЫҢ ЩҶЫҢШіШӘ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШЁШ§ Ш§ЩҲ ШіШ®ЩҶ ЪҜЩҲЫҢШҜШҢ Щ…ЪҜШұ Ш§ШІ ШұШ§ЩҮ ЩҲШӯЫҢ ЫҢШ§ Ш§ШІ ЩҫШҙШӘ ШӯШ¬Ш§ШЁШҢ ЫҢШ§ ШұШіЩҲЩ„ЫҢ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЩҒШұШіШӘШҜ ЩҲ ШЁЩҒШұЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш§ЩҲ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШұШ§ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ ЩҲШӯЫҢ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪ©ЩҶШҜШӣ ЪҶШұШ§ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ ШЁЩ„ЩҶШҜЩ…ЩӮШ§Щ… ЩҲ ШӯЪ©ЫҢЩ… Ш§ШіШӘ!
fa.makarem.text: ЩҲ ШҙШ§ЫҢШіШӘЩҮ ЩҮЫҢЪҶ Ш§ЩҶШіШ§ЩҶЫҢ ЩҶЫҢШіШӘ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШЁШ§ Ш§ЩҲ ШіШ®ЩҶ ЪҜЩҲЫҢШҜШҢ Щ…ЪҜШұ Ш§ШІ ШұШ§ЩҮ ЩҲШӯЫҢ ЫҢШ§ Ш§ШІ ЩҫШҙШӘ ШӯШ¬Ш§ШЁШҢ ЫҢШ§ ШұШіЩҲЩ„ЫҢ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЩҒШұШіШӘШҜ ЩҲ ШЁЩҒШұЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш§ЩҲ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШұШ§ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ ЩҲШӯЫҢ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪ©ЩҶШҜШӣ ЪҶШұШ§ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ ШЁЩ„ЩҶШҜЩ…ЩӮШ§Щ… ЩҲ ШӯЪ©ЫҢЩ… Ш§ШіШӘ!

segments: ЩҲ ЩҶШЁЩҲШҜЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘ ШЁШҙШұЫҢ ШұШ§ Ъ©ЩҮ ШіШ®ЩҶ ЪҜЩҲЫҢШҜШҙ Ш®ШҜШ§ Щ…ЪҜШұ ШіШұЩҲШҙЫҢ ЫҢШ§ Ш§ШІ ЩҫШҙШӘ ЩҫШұШҜЩҮ ЫҢШ§ ЩҒШұШіШӘШҜ ЩҫЫҢЪ©ЫҢ ЩҫШі ЩҲШӯЫҢ Ъ©ЩҶШҜ ШЁЩҮ ШҜШіШӘЩҲШұШҙ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ Ш®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ ЩҮЩ…Ш§ЩҶШ§ Ш§ЩҲ Ш§ШіШӘ ЩҒШұШ§ШІЩҶШҜЩҮ ШӯЪ©ЫҢЩ…вҖҢ
fa.moezzi.text: ЩҲ ЩҶШЁЩҲШҜЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘ ШЁШҙШұЫҢ ШұШ§ Ъ©ЩҮ ШіШ®ЩҶ ЪҜЩҲЫҢШҜШҙ Ш®ШҜШ§ Щ…ЪҜШұ ШіШұЩҲШҙЫҢ ЫҢШ§ Ш§ШІ ЩҫШҙШӘ ЩҫШұШҜЩҮ ЫҢШ§ ЩҒШұШіШӘШҜ ЩҫЫҢЪ©ЫҢ ЩҫШі ЩҲШӯЫҢ Ъ©ЩҶШҜ ШЁЩҮ ШҜШіШӘЩҲШұШҙ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ Ш®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ ЩҮЩ…Ш§ЩҶШ§ Ш§ЩҲ Ш§ШіШӘ ЩҒШұШ§ШІЩҶШҜЩҮ ШӯЪ©ЫҢЩ…вҖҢ

segments: ЩҲ ЩҮЩҠЪҶ ШўШҜЩ…Щү ШұШ§ ЩҶШұШіШҜ ЩғЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§Щү ШЁШ§ Ш§ЩҲ ШіШ®ЩҶ ЪҜЩҲЩҠШҜ Щ…ЪҜШұ ШЁЩҮ ЩҲШӯЩү ЩҠШ§ Ш§ШІ ЩҫШі ЩҫШұШҜЩҮШҢ ЩҠШ§ ЩҒШұШіШӘШ§ШҜЩҮвҖҢШ§Щү- ЩҒШұШҙШӘЩҮвҖҢШ§Щү- ЩҒШұШіШӘШҜ ЩҫШі ШЁЩҮ ЩҒШұЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш§ЩҲ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ Ш®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ [ШЁЩҮ ЩҲЩүвҖҢ] ЩҲШӯЩү ЩғЩҶШҜ. ЩҮЩ…Ш§ЩҶШ§ Ш§ЩҲ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш§ Щ…ШұШӘШЁЩҮ ЩҲ ШЁШ§ ШӯЩғЩ…ШӘ Ш§ШіШӘ.
fa.mojtabavi.text: ЩҲ ЩҮЩҠЪҶ ШўШҜЩ…Щү ШұШ§ ЩҶШұШіШҜ ЩғЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§Щү ШЁШ§ Ш§ЩҲ ШіШ®ЩҶ ЪҜЩҲЩҠШҜ Щ…ЪҜШұ ШЁЩҮ ЩҲШӯЩү ЩҠШ§ Ш§ШІ ЩҫШі ЩҫШұШҜЩҮШҢ ЩҠШ§ ЩҒШұШіШӘШ§ШҜЩҮвҖҢШ§Щү- ЩҒШұШҙШӘЩҮвҖҢШ§Щү- ЩҒШұШіШӘШҜ ЩҫШі ШЁЩҮ ЩҒШұЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш§ЩҲ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ Ш®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ [ШЁЩҮ ЩҲЩүвҖҢ] ЩҲШӯЩү ЩғЩҶШҜ. ЩҮЩ…Ш§ЩҶШ§ Ш§ЩҲ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш§ Щ…ШұШӘШЁЩҮ ЩҲ ШЁШ§ ШӯЩғЩ…ШӘ Ш§ШіШӘ.

segments: ЩҲ ЩҮЫҢЪҶ ШЁШҙШұЫҢ ШұШ§ ЩҶШұШіЫҢШҜЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШЁШ§ Ш§ЩҲ ШіШ®ЩҶ ЪҜЩҲЫҢШҜШҢ Ш¬ШІ ШЁЩҮ ЩҲШӯЫҢШҢ ШЁШҜЩҲЩҶ ЩҫШұШҜЩҮ ЩҲ ШӯШ¬Ш§ШЁ ЫҢШ§ Ш§ШІ ЩҒШұШ§ШіЩҲЫҢ ШӯШ¬Ш§ШЁЫҢ. ЫҢШ§ ЩҒШұШіШӘШ§ШҜЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢ ШЁЩҒШұШіШӘШҜ ЩҲ ШЁЩҮ Ш§Ш°ЩҶ Ш§ЩҲ ЩҮШұ ЪҶЩҮ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ ЩҲШӯЫҢ Ъ©ЩҶШҜ. ШЁЩҮвҖҢШұШ§ШіШӘЫҢ Ш§ЩҲШіШӘ ШЁЩ„ЩҶШҜЩ…ШұШӘШЁЩҮвҖҢШ§вҖҢЫҢ ШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢШҜЩҮвҖҢЪ©Ш§Шұ.
fa.sadeqi.text: ЩҲ ЩҮЫҢЪҶ ШЁШҙШұЫҢ ШұШ§ ЩҶШұШіЫҢШҜЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШЁШ§ Ш§ЩҲ ШіШ®ЩҶ ЪҜЩҲЫҢШҜШҢ Ш¬ШІ ШЁЩҮ ЩҲШӯЫҢШҢ ШЁШҜЩҲЩҶ ЩҫШұШҜЩҮ ЩҲ ШӯШ¬Ш§ШЁ ЫҢШ§ Ш§ШІ ЩҒШұШ§ШіЩҲЫҢ ШӯШ¬Ш§ШЁЫҢ. ЫҢШ§ ЩҒШұШіШӘШ§ШҜЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢ ШЁЩҒШұШіШӘШҜ ЩҲ ШЁЩҮ Ш§Ш°ЩҶ Ш§ЩҲ ЩҮШұ ЪҶЩҮ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ ЩҲШӯЫҢ Ъ©ЩҶШҜ. ШЁЩҮвҖҢШұШ§ШіШӘЫҢ Ш§ЩҲШіШӘ ШЁЩ„ЩҶШҜЩ…ШұШӘШЁЩҮвҖҢШ§вҖҢЫҢ ШіЩҶШ¬ЫҢШҜЩҮвҖҢЪ©Ш§Шұ.

segments: ЩҲЩҺ Ъ©ЩҺШ°Щ°Щ„ЩҗЪ©ЩҺвҖҢ ШЈЩҺЩҲЩ’ШӯЩҺЩҠЩ’ЩҶЩҺШ§ ШҘЩҗЩ„ЩҺЩҠЩ’Ъ©ЩҺвҖҢ ШұЩҸЩҲШӯШ§ЩӢ Щ…ЩҗЩҶЩ’вҖҢ ШЈЩҺЩ…Щ’ШұЩҗЩҶЩҺШ§ Щ…ЩҺШ§ Ъ©ЩҸЩҶЩ’ШӘЩҺвҖҢ ШӘЩҺШҜЩ’ШұЩҗЩҠвҖҢ Щ…ЩҺШ§ Ш§Щ„Щ’Ъ©ЩҗШӘЩҺШ§ШЁЩҸвҖҢ ЩҲЩҺ Щ„Ш§ЩҺ Ш§Щ„Щ’ШҘЩҗЩҠЩ…ЩҺШ§ЩҶЩҸвҖҢ ЩҲЩҺ Щ„Щ°Ъ©ЩҗЩҶЩ’вҖҢ Ш¬ЩҺШ№ЩҺЩ„Щ’ЩҶЩҺШ§ЩҮЩҸвҖҢ ЩҶЩҸЩҲШұШ§ЩӢ ЩҶЩҺЩҮЩ’ШҜЩҗЩҠвҖҢ ШЁЩҗЩҮЩҗвҖҢ Щ…ЩҺЩҶЩ’вҖҢ ЩҶЩҺШҙЩҺШ§ШЎЩҸ Щ…ЩҗЩҶЩ’вҖҢ Ш№ЩҗШЁЩҺШ§ШҜЩҗЩҶЩҺШ§ ЩҲЩҺ ШҘЩҗЩҶЩ‘ЩҺЪ©ЩҺвҖҢ Щ„ЩҺШӘЩҺЩҮЩ’ШҜЩҗЩҠвҖҢ ШҘЩҗЩ„ЩҺЩүвҖҢ ШөЩҗШұЩҺШ§Ш·ЩҚ Щ…ЩҸШіЩ’ШӘЩҺЩӮЩҗЩҠЩ…ЩҚвҖҢ
arabic.text: ЩҲЩҺ Ъ©ЩҺШ°Щ°Щ„ЩҗЪ©ЩҺвҖҢ ШЈЩҺЩҲЩ’ШӯЩҺЩҠЩ’ЩҶЩҺШ§ ШҘЩҗЩ„ЩҺЩҠЩ’Ъ©ЩҺвҖҢ ШұЩҸЩҲШӯШ§ЩӢ Щ…ЩҗЩҶЩ’вҖҢ ШЈЩҺЩ…Щ’ШұЩҗЩҶЩҺШ§ Щ…ЩҺШ§ Ъ©ЩҸЩҶЩ’ШӘЩҺвҖҢ ШӘЩҺШҜЩ’ШұЩҗЩҠвҖҢ Щ…ЩҺШ§ Ш§Щ„Щ’Ъ©ЩҗШӘЩҺШ§ШЁЩҸвҖҢ ЩҲЩҺ Щ„Ш§ЩҺ Ш§Щ„Щ’ШҘЩҗЩҠЩ…ЩҺШ§ЩҶЩҸвҖҢ ЩҲЩҺ Щ„Щ°Ъ©ЩҗЩҶЩ’вҖҢ Ш¬ЩҺШ№ЩҺЩ„Щ’ЩҶЩҺШ§ЩҮЩҸвҖҢ ЩҶЩҸЩҲШұШ§ЩӢ ЩҶЩҺЩҮЩ’ШҜЩҗЩҠвҖҢ ШЁЩҗЩҮЩҗвҖҢ Щ…ЩҺЩҶЩ’вҖҢ ЩҶЩҺШҙЩҺШ§ШЎЩҸ Щ…ЩҗЩҶЩ’вҖҢ Ш№ЩҗШЁЩҺШ§ШҜЩҗЩҶЩҺШ§ ЩҲЩҺ ШҘЩҗЩҶЩ‘ЩҺЪ©ЩҺвҖҢ Щ„ЩҺШӘЩҺЩҮЩ’ШҜЩҗЩҠвҖҢ ШҘЩҗЩ„ЩҺЩүвҖҢ ШөЩҗШұЩҺШ§Ш·ЩҚ Щ…ЩҸШіЩ’ШӘЩҺЩӮЩҗЩҠЩ…ЩҚвҖҢ

segments: So have We revealed to you the Qur'an by Our command. You did not know what the Scripture was before, nor (the laws of) faith. And We made it a light by which We show the way to those of Our creatures as We please; and you certainly guide them to the right path,
en.ahmedali.text: So have We revealed to you the Qur'an by Our command. You did not know what the Scripture was before, nor (the laws of) faith. And We made it a light by which We show the way to those of Our creatures as We please; and you certainly guide them to the right path,

segments: And this is how We sent the divine revelation to you (O dear Prophet Mohammed вҖ“ peace and blessings be upon him) вҖ“ a life giving thing, by Our command; neither did you know the Book nor the detailed commands of religion, but We have made this QurвҖҷan a light by which We guide whomever We will from Our bondmen; and indeed you surely do guide to the Straight Path.
en.ahmedraza.text: And this is how We sent the divine revelation to you (O dear Prophet Mohammed вҖ“ peace and blessings be upon him) вҖ“ a life giving thing, by Our command; neither did you know the Book nor the detailed commands of religion, but We have made this QurвҖҷan a light by which We guide whomever We will from Our bondmen; and indeed you surely do guide to the Straight Path.

segments: Even so We have revealed to thee a Spirit of Our bidding. Thou knewest not what the Book was, nor belief; but We made it a light, whereby We guide whom We will of Our servants. And thou, surely thou shalt guide unto a straight path --
en.arberry.text: Even so We have revealed to thee a Spirit of Our bidding. Thou knewest not what the Book was, nor belief; but We made it a light, whereby We guide whom We will of Our servants. And thou, surely thou shalt guide unto a straight path --

segments: Even so We have revealed Unto thee a spirit of Our command; thou knewest not whatsoever the Book was, nor whatsoever the faith; We have made it a light wherewith We guide whomsoever We will of Our bondmen. And verily thou guidest Unto a straight path.
en.daryabadi.text: Even so We have revealed Unto thee a spirit of Our command; thou knewest not whatsoever the Book was, nor whatsoever the faith; We have made it a light wherewith We guide whomsoever We will of Our bondmen. And verily thou guidest Unto a straight path.

segments: And thus We have sent to you (O Muhammad SAW) Ruhan (an Inspiration, and a Mercy) of Our Command. You knew not what is the Book, nor what is Faith? But We have made it (this Quran) a light wherewith We guide whosoever of Our slaves We will. And verily, you (O Muhammad SAW) are indeed guiding (mankind) to the Straight Path (i.e. Allah's religion of Islamic Monotheism).
en.hilali.text: And thus We have sent to you (O Muhammad SAW) Ruhan (an Inspiration, and a Mercy) of Our Command. You knew not what is the Book, nor what is Faith? But We have made it (this Quran) a light wherewith We guide whosoever of Our slaves We will. And verily, you (O Muhammad SAW) are indeed guiding (mankind) to the Straight Path (i.e. Allah's religion of Islamic Monotheism).

segments: We thus inspired you spiritually, by Our command. You did not know what the Scripture is, nor what faith is, but We made it a light, with which We guide whomever We will of Our servants. You surely guide to a straight path.
en.itani.text: We thus inspired you spiritually, by Our command. You did not know what the Scripture is, nor what faith is, but We made it a light, with which We guide whomever We will of Our servants. You surely guide to a straight path.

segments: Even so We revealed to you, (O Prophet), a spirit by Our command. (Ere to that) you knew neither what the Book nor what the faith was. But We made that spirit a light whereby We guide those of Our servants whom We please to the Right Way. Surely you are directing people to the Right Way,
en.maududi.text: Even so We revealed to you, (O Prophet), a spirit by Our command. (Ere to that) you knew neither what the Book nor what the faith was. But We made that spirit a light whereby We guide those of Our servants whom We please to the Right Way. Surely you are directing people to the Right Way,

segments: And thus We have sent to you Ruh of Our command. You knew not what is the Book, nor what is Faith. But We have made it a light wherewith We guide whosoever of Our servants We will. And verily, you are indeed guiding to a straight path.
en.mubarakpuri.text: And thus We have sent to you Ruh of Our command. You knew not what is the Book, nor what is Faith. But We have made it a light wherewith We guide whosoever of Our servants We will. And verily, you are indeed guiding to a straight path.

segments: And thus have We inspired in thee (Muhammad) a Spirit of Our command. Thou knewest not what the Scripture was, nor what the Faith. But We have made it a light whereby We guide whom We will of Our bondmen. And lo! thou verily dost guide unto a right path,
en.pickthall.text: And thus have We inspired in thee (Muhammad) a Spirit of Our command. Thou knewest not what the Scripture was, nor what the Faith. But We have made it a light whereby We guide whom We will of Our bondmen. And lo! thou verily dost guide unto a right path,

segments: Thus have We imbued you with a Spirit of Our command. You did not know what the Book is, nor what is faith; but We made it a light that We may guide by its means whomever We wish of Our servants. Indeed, you guide to a straight path,
en.qarai.text: Thus have We imbued you with a Spirit of Our command. You did not know what the Book is, nor what is faith; but We made it a light that We may guide by its means whomever We wish of Our servants. Indeed, you guide to a straight path,

segments: As such We have revealed to you (Prophet Muhammad) a spirit (the revelation of the Koran) from Our Ordinance. You did not know what the Book was, nor belief, but We made it a light whereby We guide those of Our worshipers whom We will. And you (Prophet Muhammad), you, surely guide to a Straight Path.
en.qaribullah.text: As such We have revealed to you (Prophet Muhammad) a spirit (the revelation of the Koran) from Our Ordinance. You did not know what the Book was, nor belief, but We made it a light whereby We guide those of Our worshipers whom We will. And you (Prophet Muhammad), you, surely guide to a Straight Path.

segments: And thus We have revealed to you an inspiration of Our command. You did not know what is the Book or [what is] faith, but We have made it a light by which We guide whom We will of Our servants. And indeed, [O Muhammad], you guide to a straight path -
en.sahih.text: And thus We have revealed to you an inspiration of Our command. You did not know what is the Book or [what is] faith, but We have made it a light by which We guide whom We will of Our servants. And indeed, [O Muhammad], you guide to a straight path -

segments: Thus, We have revealed a Spirit to you, (Muhammad), by Our command. Before, you did not even know what a Book or Faith was, but We have made the Quran as a light by which We guide whichever of Our servants We want. You certainly guide (people) to the right path,
en.sarwar.text: Thus, We have revealed a Spirit to you, (Muhammad), by Our command. Before, you did not even know what a Book or Faith was, but We have made the Quran as a light by which We guide whichever of Our servants We want. You certainly guide (people) to the right path,

segments: And thus did We reveal to you an inspired book by Our command. You did not know what the Book was, nor (what) the faith (was), but We made it a light, guiding thereby whom We please of Our servants; and most surely you show the way to the right path:
en.shakir.text: And thus did We reveal to you an inspired book by Our command. You did not know what the Book was, nor (what) the faith (was), but We made it a light, guiding thereby whom We please of Our servants; and most surely you show the way to the right path:

segments: Wakathalika awhayna ilayka roohan min amrina ma kunta tadree ma alkitabu wala aleemanu walakin jaAAalnahu nooran nahdee bihi man nashao min AAibadina wainnaka latahdee ila siratin mustaqeemin
en.transliteration.text: Wakathalika awhayna ilayka roohan min amrina ma kunta tadree ma alkitabu wala aleemanu walakin jaAAalnahu nooran nahdee bihi man nashao min AAibadina wainnaka latahdee ila siratin mustaqeemin

segments: We have thus revealed a Spirit to you [Prophet] by Our command: you knew neither the Scripture nor the faith, but We made it a light, guiding with it whoever We will of Our servants. You are indeed guiding to the straight path,
en.wahiduddin.text: We have thus revealed a Spirit to you [Prophet] by Our command: you knew neither the Scripture nor the faith, but We made it a light, guiding with it whoever We will of Our servants. You are indeed guiding to the straight path,

segments: And thus have We, by Our Command, sent inspiration to thee: thou knewest not (before) what was Revelation, and what was Faith; but We have made the (Qur'an) a Light, wherewith We guide such of Our servants as We will; and verily thou dost guide (men) to the Straight Way,-
en.yusufali.text: And thus have We, by Our Command, sent inspiration to thee: thou knewest not (before) what was Revelation, and what was Faith; but We have made the (Qur'an) a Light, wherewith We guide such of Our servants as We will; and verily thou dost guide (men) to the Straight Way,-

segments: ЩҲ ЩҮЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЪҜЩҲЩҶЩҮ [Ъ©ЩҮ ШЁШұ ЩҫЫҢШ§Щ…ШЁШұШ§ЩҶ ЩҫЫҢШҙЫҢЩҶ ЩҲШӯЫҢ Ъ©ШұШҜЫҢЩ…] ШұЩҲШӯЫҢ ШұШ§ [ЪҶЩҲЩҶ ЩӮШұШўЩҶ] Ш§ШІ Ш§Щ…Шұ Ш®ЩҲШҜ ШЁЩҮ ШӘЩҲ ЩҲШӯЫҢ Ъ©ШұШҜЫҢЩ…. ШӘЩҲ [ЩҫЫҢШҙ Ш§ШІ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ] ЩҶЩ…ЫҢ ШҜШ§ЩҶШіШӘЫҢ Ъ©ШӘШ§ШЁ ЩҲ Ш§ЫҢЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЪҶЫҢШіШӘШҹ ЩҲЩ„ЫҢ ШўЩҶ [Ъ©ШӘШ§ШЁ] ШұШ§ ЩҶЩҲШұЫҢ ЩӮШұШ§Шұ ШҜШ§ШҜЫҢЩ… Ъ©ЩҮ ЩҮШұ Ъ©Ші Ш§ШІ ШЁЩҶШҜЪҜШ§ЩҶЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШұШ§ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮЫҢЩ… ШЁЩҮ ЩҲШіЫҢЩ„ЩҮ ШўЩҶ ЩҮШҜШ§ЫҢШӘ Щ…ЫҢ Ъ©ЩҶЫҢЩ…Шӣ ШЁЫҢ ШӘШұШҜЫҢШҜ ШӘЩҲ [Щ…ШұШҜЩ… ШұШ§] ШЁЩҮ ШұШ§ЩҮЫҢ ШұШ§ШіШӘ ЩҮШҜШ§ЫҢШӘ Щ…ЫҢ ЩҶЩ…Ш§ЫҢЫҢ.
fa.ansarian.text: ЩҲ ЩҮЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЪҜЩҲЩҶЩҮ [Ъ©ЩҮ ШЁШұ ЩҫЫҢШ§Щ…ШЁШұШ§ЩҶ ЩҫЫҢШҙЫҢЩҶ ЩҲШӯЫҢ Ъ©ШұШҜЫҢЩ…] ШұЩҲШӯЫҢ ШұШ§ [ЪҶЩҲЩҶ ЩӮШұШўЩҶ] Ш§ШІ Ш§Щ…Шұ Ш®ЩҲШҜ ШЁЩҮ ШӘЩҲ ЩҲШӯЫҢ Ъ©ШұШҜЫҢЩ…. ШӘЩҲ [ЩҫЫҢШҙ Ш§ШІ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ] ЩҶЩ…ЫҢ ШҜШ§ЩҶШіШӘЫҢ Ъ©ШӘШ§ШЁ ЩҲ Ш§ЫҢЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЪҶЫҢШіШӘШҹ ЩҲЩ„ЫҢ ШўЩҶ [Ъ©ШӘШ§ШЁ] ШұШ§ ЩҶЩҲШұЫҢ ЩӮШұШ§Шұ ШҜШ§ШҜЫҢЩ… Ъ©ЩҮ ЩҮШұ Ъ©Ші Ш§ШІ ШЁЩҶШҜЪҜШ§ЩҶЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШұШ§ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮЫҢЩ… ШЁЩҮ ЩҲШіЫҢЩ„ЩҮ ШўЩҶ ЩҮШҜШ§ЫҢШӘ Щ…ЫҢ Ъ©ЩҶЫҢЩ…Шӣ ШЁЫҢ ШӘШұШҜЫҢШҜ ШӘЩҲ [Щ…ШұШҜЩ… ШұШ§] ШЁЩҮ ШұШ§ЩҮЫҢ ШұШ§ШіШӘ ЩҮШҜШ§ЫҢШӘ Щ…ЫҢ ЩҶЩ…Ш§ЫҢЫҢ.

segments: ЩҮЩ…ЪҶЩҶЩҠЩҶ ЩғЩ„Ш§Щ… Ш®ЩҲШҜ ШұШ§ ШЁЩҮ ЩҒШұЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш®ЩҲШҜ ШЁЩҮ ШӘЩҲ ЩҲШӯЩү ЩғШұШҜЩҠЩ…. ШӘЩҲ ЩҶЩ…ЩүвҖҢШҜШ§ЩҶШіШӘЩү ЩғШӘШ§ШЁ ЩҲ Ш§ЩҠЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЪҶЩҠШіШӘ. ЩҲЩ„Щү Щ…Ш§ ШўЩҶ ШұШ§ ЩҶЩҲШұЩү ШіШ§Ш®ШӘЩҠЩ… ШӘШ§ ЩҮШұ ЩҠЩғ Ш§ШІ ШЁЩҶШҜЪҜШ§ЩҶЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШұШ§ ЩғЩҮ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮЩҠЩ… ШЁШҜШ§ЩҶ ЩҮШҜШ§ЩҠШӘ ЩғЩҶЩҠЩ… ЩҲ ШӘЩҲ ШЁЩҮ ШұШ§ЩҮ ШұШ§ШіШӘ ШұШ§ЩҮ Щ…ЩүвҖҢЩҶЩ…Ш§ЩҠЩүШҢ
fa.ayati.text: ЩҮЩ…ЪҶЩҶЩҠЩҶ ЩғЩ„Ш§Щ… Ш®ЩҲШҜ ШұШ§ ШЁЩҮ ЩҒШұЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш®ЩҲШҜ ШЁЩҮ ШӘЩҲ ЩҲШӯЩү ЩғШұШҜЩҠЩ…. ШӘЩҲ ЩҶЩ…ЩүвҖҢШҜШ§ЩҶШіШӘЩү ЩғШӘШ§ШЁ ЩҲ Ш§ЩҠЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЪҶЩҠШіШӘ. ЩҲЩ„Щү Щ…Ш§ ШўЩҶ ШұШ§ ЩҶЩҲШұЩү ШіШ§Ш®ШӘЩҠЩ… ШӘШ§ ЩҮШұ ЩҠЩғ Ш§ШІ ШЁЩҶШҜЪҜШ§ЩҶЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШұШ§ ЩғЩҮ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮЩҠЩ… ШЁШҜШ§ЩҶ ЩҮШҜШ§ЩҠШӘ ЩғЩҶЩҠЩ… ЩҲ ШӘЩҲ ШЁЩҮ ШұШ§ЩҮ ШұШ§ШіШӘ ШұШ§ЩҮ Щ…ЩүвҖҢЩҶЩ…Ш§ЩҠЩүШҢ

segments: ЩҲ ЩҮЩ…ЩҠЩҶ ЪҜЩҲЩҶЩҮ Щ…Ш§ ШұЩҲШӯЩү Ш§ШІ Ш§Щ…Шұ Ш®ЩҲШҜ ШұШ§ [ШЁЩҮ ШөЩҲШұШӘ ЩӮШұШўЩҶвҖҢ] ШЁЩҮ ШӘЩҲ ЩҲШӯЩү ЩғШұШҜЩҠЩ…ШҢ [ЩҲ ЪҜШұ ЩҶЩҮвҖҢ] ШӘЩҲ ЩҶЩ…ЩүвҖҢШҜШ§ЩҶШіШӘЩү ЩғШӘШ§ШЁ ЪҶЩҠШіШӘ ЩҲ Ш§ЩҠЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩғШҜШ§Щ… Ш§ШіШӘШҹ ЩҲЩ„Щү Щ…Ш§ ШўЩҶ ШұШ§ ЩҶЩҲШұЩү ШіШ§Ш®ШӘЩҠЩ… ЩғЩҮ ЩҮШұ ЩҠЩғ Ш§ШІ ШЁЩҶШҜЪҜШ§ЩҶ Ш®ЩҲШҜ ШұШ§ ЩғЩҮ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮЩҠЩ… ШЁЩҮ ЩҲШіЩҠЩ„ЩҮ ШўЩҶ ЩҮШҜШ§ЩҠШӘ Щ…ЩүвҖҢЩғЩҶЩҠЩ…ШҢ ЩҲ ШЁЩүвҖҢШӘШұШҜЩҠШҜ ШӘЩҲ [Щ…ШұШҜЩ… ШұШ§] ШЁЩҮ ШұШ§ЩҮ ШұШ§ШіШӘ ЩҮШҜШ§ЩҠ
fa.bahrampour.text: ЩҲ ЩҮЩ…ЩҠЩҶ ЪҜЩҲЩҶЩҮ Щ…Ш§ ШұЩҲШӯЩү Ш§ШІ Ш§Щ…Шұ Ш®ЩҲШҜ ШұШ§ [ШЁЩҮ ШөЩҲШұШӘ ЩӮШұШўЩҶвҖҢ] ШЁЩҮ ШӘЩҲ ЩҲШӯЩү ЩғШұШҜЩҠЩ…ШҢ [ЩҲ ЪҜШұ ЩҶЩҮвҖҢ] ШӘЩҲ ЩҶЩ…ЩүвҖҢШҜШ§ЩҶШіШӘЩү ЩғШӘШ§ШЁ ЪҶЩҠШіШӘ ЩҲ Ш§ЩҠЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩғШҜШ§Щ… Ш§ШіШӘШҹ ЩҲЩ„Щү Щ…Ш§ ШўЩҶ ШұШ§ ЩҶЩҲШұЩү ШіШ§Ш®ШӘЩҠЩ… ЩғЩҮ ЩҮШұ ЩҠЩғ Ш§ШІ ШЁЩҶШҜЪҜШ§ЩҶ Ш®ЩҲШҜ ШұШ§ ЩғЩҮ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮЩҠЩ… ШЁЩҮ ЩҲШіЩҠЩ„ЩҮ ШўЩҶ ЩҮШҜШ§ЩҠШӘ Щ…ЩүвҖҢЩғЩҶЩҠЩ…ШҢ ЩҲ ШЁЩүвҖҢШӘШұШҜЩҠШҜ ШӘЩҲ [Щ…ШұШҜЩ… ШұШ§] ШЁЩҮ ШұШ§ЩҮ ШұШ§ШіШӘ ЩҮШҜШ§ЩҠ

segments: ЩҲЩҮЩ…ЩҠЩҶ ЪҜЩҲЩҶЩҮШҢ ШұЩҲШӯЩү Ш§ШІ Ш§Щ…Шұ Ш®ЩҲШҜЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШЁЩҮ ШіЩҲЩү ШӘЩҲ ЩҲШӯЩү ЩғШұШҜЩҠЩ…. ШӘЩҲ ЩҶЩ…ЩүвҖҢШҜШ§ЩҶШіШӘЩү ЩғШӘШ§ШЁ ЪҶЩҠШіШӘ ЩҲ ЩҶЩҮ Ш§ЩҠЩ…Ш§ЩҶ [ЩғШҜШ§Щ… Ш§ШіШӘШҹ] ЩҲЩ„Щү ШўЩҶ ШұШ§ ЩҶЩҲШұЩү ЪҜШұШҜШ§ЩҶЩҠШҜЩҠЩ… ЩғЩҮ ЩҮШұ ЩғЩҮ Ш§ШІ ШЁЩҶШҜЪҜШ§ЩҶ Ш®ЩҲШҜ ШұШ§ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮЩҠЩ… ШЁЩҮ ЩҲШіЩҠЩ„ЩҮ ШўЩҶ ШұШ§ЩҮ Щ…ЩүвҖҢЩҶЩ…Ш§ЩҠЩҠЩ…ШҢ ЩҲ ШЁЩҮ ШұШ§ШіШӘЩү ЩғЩҮ ШӘЩҲ ШЁЩҮ Ш®ЩҲШЁЩү ШЁЩҮ ШұШ§ЩҮ ШұШ§ШіШӘ ЩҮШҜШ§ЩҠШӘ Щ…ЩүвҖҢЩғЩҶЩү.
fa.fooladvand.text: ЩҲЩҮЩ…ЩҠЩҶ ЪҜЩҲЩҶЩҮШҢ ШұЩҲШӯЩү Ш§ШІ Ш§Щ…Шұ Ш®ЩҲШҜЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШЁЩҮ ШіЩҲЩү ШӘЩҲ ЩҲШӯЩү ЩғШұШҜЩҠЩ…. ШӘЩҲ ЩҶЩ…ЩүвҖҢШҜШ§ЩҶШіШӘЩү ЩғШӘШ§ШЁ ЪҶЩҠШіШӘ ЩҲ ЩҶЩҮ Ш§ЩҠЩ…Ш§ЩҶ [ЩғШҜШ§Щ… Ш§ШіШӘШҹ] ЩҲЩ„Щү ШўЩҶ ШұШ§ ЩҶЩҲШұЩү ЪҜШұШҜШ§ЩҶЩҠШҜЩҠЩ… ЩғЩҮ ЩҮШұ ЩғЩҮ Ш§ШІ ШЁЩҶШҜЪҜШ§ЩҶ Ш®ЩҲШҜ ШұШ§ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮЩҠЩ… ШЁЩҮ ЩҲШіЩҠЩ„ЩҮ ШўЩҶ ШұШ§ЩҮ Щ…ЩүвҖҢЩҶЩ…Ш§ЩҠЩҠЩ…ШҢ ЩҲ ШЁЩҮ ШұШ§ШіШӘЩү ЩғЩҮ ШӘЩҲ ШЁЩҮ Ш®ЩҲШЁЩү ШЁЩҮ ШұШ§ЩҮ ШұШ§ШіШӘ ЩҮШҜШ§ЩҠШӘ Щ…ЩүвҖҢЩғЩҶЩү.

segments: ЩҲ ЩҮЩ…ЫҢЩҶ ЪҜЩҲЩҶЩҮ Щ…Ш§ ШұЩҲШӯ (ЩҲ ЩҒШұШҙШӘЩҮ ШЁШІШұЪҜ) Ш®ЩҲШҜ ШұШ§ ШЁЩҮ ЩҒШұЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш®ЩҲЫҢШҙ (ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩҲШӯЫҢ) ШЁЩҮ ШӘЩҲ ЩҒШұШіШӘШ§ШҜЫҢЩ…ШҢ ШӘЩҲ Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶ ЩҫЫҢШҙ Ъ©ЩҮ ЩҲШӯЫҢ ШЁШұ ШӘЩҲ ШұШіШҜ ЩҶЩҮ ШҜШ§ЩҶШіШӘЫҢ Ъ©ШӘШ§ШЁ (Ш®ШҜШ§) ЪҶЫҢШіШӘ ЩҲ ЩҶЩҮ ЩҒЩҮЩ… Ъ©ШұШҜЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ ШұШ§ЩҮ Ш§ЫҢЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩҲ ШҙШұШ№ Ъ©ШҜШ§Щ… Ш§ШіШӘ ЩҲ Щ„ЫҢЪ©ЩҶ Щ…Ш§ ШўЩҶ (Ъ©ШӘШ§ШЁ ЩҲ ШҙШұШ№) ШұШ§ ЩҶЩҲШұ (ЩҲШӯЫҢ ЩҲ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒШӘ) ЪҜШұШҜШ§ЩҶЫҢШҜЫҢЩ… Ъ©ЩҮ ЩҮШұ Ъ©Ші Ш§ШІ ШЁЩҶШҜЪҜШ§ЩҶ Ш®ЩҲШҜ ШұШ§ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮЫҢЩ… ШЁЩҮ ШўЩҶ ЩҶЩҲШұ ЩҮШҜШ§ЫҢШӘ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪ©ЩҶЫҢЩ… ЩҲ Ш§ЫҢЩҶЪ© ШӘЩҲ (Ъ©ЩҮ ШЁЩҮ ЩҶЩҲШұ ЩҲШӯЫҢ Щ…Ш§ ЩҮШҜШ§ЫҢШӘ ЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘЫҢ Ш®Щ„ЩӮ ШұШ§) ШЁЩҮ ШұШ§ЩҮ ШұШ§ШіШӘ ЩҮШҜШ§ЫҢШӘ Ш®ЩҲШ§ЩҮЫҢ Ъ©ШұШҜ.
fa.ghomshei.text: ЩҲ ЩҮЩ…ЫҢЩҶ ЪҜЩҲЩҶЩҮ Щ…Ш§ ШұЩҲШӯ (ЩҲ ЩҒШұШҙШӘЩҮ ШЁШІШұЪҜ) Ш®ЩҲШҜ ШұШ§ ШЁЩҮ ЩҒШұЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш®ЩҲЫҢШҙ (ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ ЩҲШӯЫҢ) ШЁЩҮ ШӘЩҲ ЩҒШұШіШӘШ§ШҜЫҢЩ…ШҢ ШӘЩҲ Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶ ЩҫЫҢШҙ Ъ©ЩҮ ЩҲШӯЫҢ ШЁШұ ШӘЩҲ ШұШіШҜ ЩҶЩҮ ШҜШ§ЩҶШіШӘЫҢ Ъ©ШӘШ§ШЁ (Ш®ШҜШ§) ЪҶЫҢШіШӘ ЩҲ ЩҶЩҮ ЩҒЩҮЩ… Ъ©ШұШҜЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ ШұШ§ЩҮ Ш§ЫҢЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩҲ ШҙШұШ№ Ъ©ШҜШ§Щ… Ш§ШіШӘ ЩҲ Щ„ЫҢЪ©ЩҶ Щ…Ш§ ШўЩҶ (Ъ©ШӘШ§ШЁ ЩҲ ШҙШұШ№) ШұШ§ ЩҶЩҲШұ (ЩҲШӯЫҢ ЩҲ Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒШӘ) ЪҜШұШҜШ§ЩҶЫҢШҜЫҢЩ… Ъ©ЩҮ ЩҮШұ Ъ©Ші Ш§ШІ ШЁЩҶШҜЪҜШ§ЩҶ Ш®ЩҲШҜ ШұШ§ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮЫҢЩ… ШЁЩҮ ШўЩҶ ЩҶЩҲШұ ЩҮШҜШ§ЫҢШӘ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪ©ЩҶЫҢЩ… ЩҲ Ш§ЫҢЩҶЪ© ШӘЩҲ (Ъ©ЩҮ ШЁЩҮ ЩҶЩҲШұ ЩҲШӯЫҢ Щ…Ш§ ЩҮШҜШ§ЫҢШӘ ЫҢШ§ЩҒШӘЫҢ Ш®Щ„ЩӮ ШұШ§) ШЁЩҮ ШұШ§ЩҮ ШұШ§ШіШӘ ЩҮШҜШ§ЫҢШӘ Ш®ЩҲШ§ЩҮЫҢ Ъ©ШұШҜ.

segments: ЩҮЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЪҜЩҲЩҶЩҮ Ъ©ЩҮ ШЁЩҮ ЩҫЫҢШәЩ…ШЁШұШ§ЩҶ ЩҫЫҢШҙЫҢЩҶ ЩҲШӯЫҢ Ъ©ШұШҜЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢЩ…ШҢ ШЁЩҮ ШӘЩҲ ЩҶЫҢШІ ШЁЩҮ ЩҒШұЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш®ЩҲШҜ Ш¬Ш§ЩҶ ШұШ§ ЩҲШӯЫҢ Ъ©ШұШҜЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢЩ… (Ъ©ЩҮ ЩӮШұШўЩҶ ЩҶШ§Щ… ШҜШ§ШұШҜ ЩҲ Щ…Ш§ЫҢЩҮвҖҢЫҢ ШӯЫҢШ§ШӘ ШҜЩ„ЩҮШ§ Ш§ШіШӘ. ЩҫЫҢШҙ Ш§ШІ ЩҲШӯЫҢ) ШӘЩҲ Ъ©ЩҮ ЩҶЩ…ЫҢвҖҢШҜШ§ЩҶШіШӘЫҢ Ъ©ШӘШ§ШЁ ЪҶЫҢШіШӘ ЩҲ Ш§ЫҢЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ъ©ШҜШ§Щ…ШҢ ЩҲЩ„ЫҢЪ©ЩҶ Щ…Ш§ ЩӮШұШўЩҶ ШұШ§ ЩҶЩҲШұ Ш№ШёЫҢЩ…ЫҢ ЩҶЩ…ЩҲШҜЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢЩ… Ъ©ЩҮ ШҜШұ ЩҫШұШӘЩҲ ШўЩҶ ЩҮШұ Ъ©Ші Ш§ШІ ШЁЩҶШҜЪҜШ§ЩҶ Ш®ЩҲЫҢШҙ ШұШ§ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮЫҢЩ… ЩҮШҜШ§ЫҢШӘ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШЁШ®ШҙЫҢЩ…. ШӘЩҲ ЩӮШ·Ш№Ш§ЩӢ (Щ…ШұШҜЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШұШ§ ШЁШ§ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ЩӮШұШўЩҶ) ШЁЩҮ ШұШ§ЩҮ ШұШ§ШіШӘ ШұЩҮЩҶЩ…ЩҲШҜ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШіШ§ШІЫҢ. [[В«Ъ©ЩҺШ°Щ„ЩҗЪ©ЩҺВ»: ЩҮЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЪҜЩҲЩҶЩҮ Ъ©ЩҮ ШЁЩҮ ЩҫЫҢШәЩ…ШЁШұШ§ЩҶ ЩҲШӯЫҢ Ъ©ШұШҜЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢЩ…. ШЁЩҮ ЩҮЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШіЩҮ ШҙЪ©Щ„ЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ ШЁЩҮ ЩҫЫҢШәЩ…ШЁШұШ§ЩҶ ЩҲШӯЫҢ Ъ©ШұШҜЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢЩ…. В«ШұЩҸЩҲШӯШ§ЩӢВ»: Щ…ШұШ§ШҜ ЩӮШұШўЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘ Ъ©ЩҮ ШЁЩҮ Ш§ЩҶШіШ§ЩҶЩҮШ§ ШӯЫҢШ§ШӘ Ш¬Ш§ЩҲШҜШ§ЩҶЩҮ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШЁШ®ШҙШҜ (ЩҶЪҜШ§: Ш§ЩҶЩҒШ§Щ„ / 24). ЫҢШ§ Щ…ШұШ§ШҜ ЩҮЩ…ЩҮ ЪҶЫҢШІЩҮШ§ШҰЫҢ Ш§ШіШӘ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШЁШҜЩҲ ЩҲШӯЫҢ ЩҒШұЩ…ЩҲШҜЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘ (ЩҶЪҜШ§: ЩҶШӯЩ„ / 2). В«Ш§Щ„Щ’Ъ©ЩҗШӘЩҺШ§ШЁЩҸВ»: Щ…ШұШ§ШҜ ЩӮШұШўЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘ. В«Ш§Щ„ШҘЩҗЫҢЩ…ЩҺШ§ЩҶЩҸВ»: Ш§ЫҢЩ…Ш§ЩҶ. Щ…ШұШ§ШҜ ШӘЩҶЩҮШ§ ШЁШ§ЩҲШұ ЩҲ ШӘШөШҜЫҢЩӮ Щ…Ш¬ШұЩ‘ШҜ ЩҶЫҢШіШӘШҢ ШЁЩ„Ъ©ЩҮ Щ…ШұШ§ШҜ ШўЪҜШ§ЩҮЫҢ Ъ©Ш§Щ…Щ„ Ш§ШІ Ш§ЫҢЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩҲ ШўШҙЩҶШ§ШҰЫҢ ШЁЩҮ ШӘЩҒШ§ШөЫҢЩ„ ЩӮЩҲШ§ЩҶЫҢЩҶ ШҜЫҢЩҶЫҢ Ш§ШіШӘ Ъ©ЩҮ ШЁШ§ Ш®ЩҲШҜ ШўЩҲШұШҜЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘ (ЩҶЪҜШ§: ШЁЩӮШұЩҮ / 143). В«ЩҶЩҸЩҲШұШ§ЩӢВ»: ЩҶЩҲШұ Ш№ШёЫҢЩ…ЫҢ.]]
fa.khorramdel.text: ЩҮЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЪҜЩҲЩҶЩҮ Ъ©ЩҮ ШЁЩҮ ЩҫЫҢШәЩ…ШЁШұШ§ЩҶ ЩҫЫҢШҙЫҢЩҶ ЩҲШӯЫҢ Ъ©ШұШҜЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢЩ…ШҢ ШЁЩҮ ШӘЩҲ ЩҶЫҢШІ ШЁЩҮ ЩҒШұЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш®ЩҲШҜ Ш¬Ш§ЩҶ ШұШ§ ЩҲШӯЫҢ Ъ©ШұШҜЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢЩ… (Ъ©ЩҮ ЩӮШұШўЩҶ ЩҶШ§Щ… ШҜШ§ШұШҜ ЩҲ Щ…Ш§ЫҢЩҮвҖҢЫҢ ШӯЫҢШ§ШӘ ШҜЩ„ЩҮШ§ Ш§ШіШӘ. ЩҫЫҢШҙ Ш§ШІ ЩҲШӯЫҢ) ШӘЩҲ Ъ©ЩҮ ЩҶЩ…ЫҢвҖҢШҜШ§ЩҶШіШӘЫҢ Ъ©ШӘШ§ШЁ ЪҶЫҢШіШӘ ЩҲ Ш§ЫҢЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ъ©ШҜШ§Щ…ШҢ ЩҲЩ„ЫҢЪ©ЩҶ Щ…Ш§ ЩӮШұШўЩҶ ШұШ§ ЩҶЩҲШұ Ш№ШёЫҢЩ…ЫҢ ЩҶЩ…ЩҲШҜЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢЩ… Ъ©ЩҮ ШҜШұ ЩҫШұШӘЩҲ ШўЩҶ ЩҮШұ Ъ©Ші Ш§ШІ ШЁЩҶШҜЪҜШ§ЩҶ Ш®ЩҲЫҢШҙ ШұШ§ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮЫҢЩ… ЩҮШҜШ§ЫҢШӘ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШЁШ®ШҙЫҢЩ…. ШӘЩҲ ЩӮШ·Ш№Ш§ЩӢ (Щ…ШұШҜЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШұШ§ ШЁШ§ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ЩӮШұШўЩҶ) ШЁЩҮ ШұШ§ЩҮ ШұШ§ШіШӘ ШұЩҮЩҶЩ…ЩҲШҜ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШіШ§ШІЫҢ. [[В«Ъ©ЩҺШ°Щ„ЩҗЪ©ЩҺВ»: ЩҮЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЪҜЩҲЩҶЩҮ Ъ©ЩҮ ШЁЩҮ ЩҫЫҢШәЩ…ШЁШұШ§ЩҶ ЩҲШӯЫҢ Ъ©ШұШҜЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢЩ…. ШЁЩҮ ЩҮЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШіЩҮ ШҙЪ©Щ„ЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ ШЁЩҮ ЩҫЫҢШәЩ…ШЁШұШ§ЩҶ ЩҲШӯЫҢ Ъ©ШұШҜЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢЩ…. В«ШұЩҸЩҲШӯШ§ЩӢВ»: Щ…ШұШ§ШҜ ЩӮШұШўЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘ Ъ©ЩҮ ШЁЩҮ Ш§ЩҶШіШ§ЩҶЩҮШ§ ШӯЫҢШ§ШӘ Ш¬Ш§ЩҲШҜШ§ЩҶЩҮ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШЁШ®ШҙШҜ (ЩҶЪҜШ§: Ш§ЩҶЩҒШ§Щ„ / 24). ЫҢШ§ Щ…ШұШ§ШҜ ЩҮЩ…ЩҮ ЪҶЫҢШІЩҮШ§ШҰЫҢ Ш§ШіШӘ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШЁШҜЩҲ ЩҲШӯЫҢ ЩҒШұЩ…ЩҲШҜЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘ (ЩҶЪҜШ§: ЩҶШӯЩ„ / 2). В«Ш§Щ„Щ’Ъ©ЩҗШӘЩҺШ§ШЁЩҸВ»: Щ…ШұШ§ШҜ ЩӮШұШўЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘ. В«Ш§Щ„ШҘЩҗЫҢЩ…ЩҺШ§ЩҶЩҸВ»: Ш§ЫҢЩ…Ш§ЩҶ. Щ…ШұШ§ШҜ ШӘЩҶЩҮШ§ ШЁШ§ЩҲШұ ЩҲ ШӘШөШҜЫҢЩӮ Щ…Ш¬ШұЩ‘ШҜ ЩҶЫҢШіШӘШҢ ШЁЩ„Ъ©ЩҮ Щ…ШұШ§ШҜ ШўЪҜШ§ЩҮЫҢ Ъ©Ш§Щ…Щ„ Ш§ШІ Ш§ЫҢЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩҲ ШўШҙЩҶШ§ШҰЫҢ ШЁЩҮ ШӘЩҒШ§ШөЫҢЩ„ ЩӮЩҲШ§ЩҶЫҢЩҶ ШҜЫҢЩҶЫҢ Ш§ШіШӘ Ъ©ЩҮ ШЁШ§ Ш®ЩҲШҜ ШўЩҲШұШҜЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘ (ЩҶЪҜШ§: ШЁЩӮШұЩҮ / 143). В«ЩҶЩҸЩҲШұШ§ЩӢВ»: ЩҶЩҲШұ Ш№ШёЫҢЩ…ЫҢ.]]

segments: ЩҲ ШЁШҜЫҢЩҶвҖҢШіШ§ЩҶ [ЩҫЫҢШ§Щ… ЩҲ Ъ©ШӘШ§ШЁвҖҢ] ШұЩҲШӯШЁШ®ШҙЫҢ Ш§ШІ Ш§Щ…Шұ Ш®ЩҲЫҢШҙ ШЁЩҮ ШӘЩҲ ЩҲШӯЫҢ Ъ©ШұШҜЫҢЩ…ШҢ ЩҲ ШӘЩҲ ЩҫЫҢШҙШӘШұ ЩҶЩ…ЫҢвҖҢШҜШ§ЩҶШіШӘЫҢ Ъ©ШӘШ§ШЁ ЪҶЫҢШіШӘ ЩҲ Ш§ЫҢЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЪҶЫҢШіШӘШҹ ЩҲЩ„ЫҢ ШўЩҶ ШұШ§ ЩҮЩ…ЪҶЩҲЩҶ ЩҶЩҲШұЫҢ ЪҜШұШҜШ§ЩҶШҜЫҢЩ… Ъ©ЩҮ ЩҮШұЪ©Ші ШұШ§ Ш§ШІ ШЁЩҶШҜЪҜШ§ЩҶ Ш®ЩҲЫҢШҙ Ъ©ЩҮ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮЫҢЩ… ШЁШ§ ШўЩҶ ЩҮШҜШ§ЫҢШӘ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪ©ЩҶЫҢЩ… ЩҲ ШЁЫҢвҖҢЪҜЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШӘЩҲ ШЁЩҮ ШұШ§ЩҮЫҢ ШұШ§ШіШӘ ЩҮШҜШ§ЫҢШӘ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪ©ЩҶЫҢвҖҢ
fa.khorramshahi.text: ЩҲ ШЁШҜЫҢЩҶвҖҢШіШ§ЩҶ [ЩҫЫҢШ§Щ… ЩҲ Ъ©ШӘШ§ШЁвҖҢ] ШұЩҲШӯШЁШ®ШҙЫҢ Ш§ШІ Ш§Щ…Шұ Ш®ЩҲЫҢШҙ ШЁЩҮ ШӘЩҲ ЩҲШӯЫҢ Ъ©ШұШҜЫҢЩ…ШҢ ЩҲ ШӘЩҲ ЩҫЫҢШҙШӘШұ ЩҶЩ…ЫҢвҖҢШҜШ§ЩҶШіШӘЫҢ Ъ©ШӘШ§ШЁ ЪҶЫҢШіШӘ ЩҲ Ш§ЫҢЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЪҶЫҢШіШӘШҹ ЩҲЩ„ЫҢ ШўЩҶ ШұШ§ ЩҮЩ…ЪҶЩҲЩҶ ЩҶЩҲШұЫҢ ЪҜШұШҜШ§ЩҶШҜЫҢЩ… Ъ©ЩҮ ЩҮШұЪ©Ші ШұШ§ Ш§ШІ ШЁЩҶШҜЪҜШ§ЩҶ Ш®ЩҲЫҢШҙ Ъ©ЩҮ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮЫҢЩ… ШЁШ§ ШўЩҶ ЩҮШҜШ§ЫҢШӘ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪ©ЩҶЫҢЩ… ЩҲ ШЁЫҢвҖҢЪҜЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШӘЩҲ ШЁЩҮ ШұШ§ЩҮЫҢ ШұШ§ШіШӘ ЩҮШҜШ§ЫҢШӘ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪ©ЩҶЫҢвҖҢ

segments: ЩҮЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЪҜЩҲЩҶЩҮ (Ъ©ЩҮ ШЁШұ ЩҫЫҢШ§Щ…ШЁШұШ§ЩҶ ЩҫЫҢШҙЫҢЩҶ ЩҲШӯЫҢ ЩҒШұШіШӘШ§ШҜЫҢЩ…) ШЁШұ ШӘЩҲ ЩҶЫҢШІ ШұЩҲШӯЫҢ ШұШ§ ШЁЩҒШұЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш®ЩҲШҜ ЩҲШӯЫҢ Ъ©ШұШҜЫҢЩ…Шӣ ШӘЩҲ ЩҫЫҢШҙ Ш§ШІ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ЩҶЩ…ЫҢвҖҢШҜШ§ЩҶШіШӘЫҢ Ъ©ШӘШ§ШЁ ЩҲ Ш§ЫҢЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЪҶЫҢШіШӘ (ЩҲ Ш§ШІ Щ…ШӯШӘЩҲШ§ЫҢ ЩӮШұШўЩҶ ШўЪҜШ§ЩҮ ЩҶШЁЩҲШҜЫҢ)Шӣ ЩҲЩ„ЫҢ Щ…Ш§ ШўЩҶ ШұШ§ ЩҶЩҲШұЫҢ ЩӮШұШ§Шұ ШҜШ§ШҜЫҢЩ… Ъ©ЩҮ ШЁЩҲШіЫҢЩ„ЩҮ ШўЩҶ ЩҮШұ Ъ©Ші Ш§ШІ ШЁЩҶШҜЪҜШ§ЩҶ Ш®ЩҲЫҢШҙ ШұШ§ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮЫҢЩ… ЩҮШҜШ§ЫҢШӘ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪ©ЩҶЫҢЩ…Шӣ ЩҲ ШӘЩҲ Щ…ШіЩ„Щ‘Щ…Ш§ЩӢ ШЁЩҮ ШіЩҲЫҢ ШұШ§ЩҮ ШұШ§ШіШӘ ЩҮШҜШ§ЫҢШӘ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪ©ЩҶЫҢ.
fa.makarem.text: ЩҮЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЪҜЩҲЩҶЩҮ (Ъ©ЩҮ ШЁШұ ЩҫЫҢШ§Щ…ШЁШұШ§ЩҶ ЩҫЫҢШҙЫҢЩҶ ЩҲШӯЫҢ ЩҒШұШіШӘШ§ШҜЫҢЩ…) ШЁШұ ШӘЩҲ ЩҶЫҢШІ ШұЩҲШӯЫҢ ШұШ§ ШЁЩҒШұЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш®ЩҲШҜ ЩҲШӯЫҢ Ъ©ШұШҜЫҢЩ…Шӣ ШӘЩҲ ЩҫЫҢШҙ Ш§ШІ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ЩҶЩ…ЫҢвҖҢШҜШ§ЩҶШіШӘЫҢ Ъ©ШӘШ§ШЁ ЩҲ Ш§ЫҢЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЪҶЫҢШіШӘ (ЩҲ Ш§ШІ Щ…ШӯШӘЩҲШ§ЫҢ ЩӮШұШўЩҶ ШўЪҜШ§ЩҮ ЩҶШЁЩҲШҜЫҢ)Шӣ ЩҲЩ„ЫҢ Щ…Ш§ ШўЩҶ ШұШ§ ЩҶЩҲШұЫҢ ЩӮШұШ§Шұ ШҜШ§ШҜЫҢЩ… Ъ©ЩҮ ШЁЩҲШіЫҢЩ„ЩҮ ШўЩҶ ЩҮШұ Ъ©Ші Ш§ШІ ШЁЩҶШҜЪҜШ§ЩҶ Ш®ЩҲЫҢШҙ ШұШ§ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮЫҢЩ… ЩҮШҜШ§ЫҢШӘ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪ©ЩҶЫҢЩ…Шӣ ЩҲ ШӘЩҲ Щ…ШіЩ„Щ‘Щ…Ш§ЩӢ ШЁЩҮ ШіЩҲЫҢ ШұШ§ЩҮ ШұШ§ШіШӘ ЩҮШҜШ§ЫҢШӘ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪ©ЩҶЫҢ.

segments: ЩҲ ШЁШҜЫҢЩҶШіШ§ЩҶ ЩҲШӯЫҢ ЩҒШұШіШӘШ§ШҜЫҢЩ… ШЁШіЩҲЫҢ ШӘЩҲ ШұЩҲШӯЫҢ (ШұЩҲШ§ЩҶЫҢ) ШұШ§ Ш§ШІ Ш§Щ…Шұ Щ…Ш§ ЩҶШЁЩҲШҜЫҢ ШЁШҜШ§ЩҶЫҢ ЪҶЫҢШіШӘ Ъ©ШӘШ§ШЁ ЩҲ ЩҶЩҮ Ш§ЫҢЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩҲ Щ„ЫҢЪ©ЩҶ ЪҜШұШҜШ§ЩҶЫҢШҜЫҢЩ…Шҙ ШӘШ§ШЁШҙЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ ШұЩҮШЁШұЫҢ Ъ©ЩҶЫҢЩ… ШЁШҜШ§ЩҶ ЩҮШұ Ъ©ЩҮ ШұШ§ Ш®ЩҲШ§ЩҮЫҢЩ… Ш§ШІ ШЁЩҶШҜЪҜШ§ЩҶ Ш®ЩҲШҜ ЩҲ ЩҮЩ…Ш§ЩҶШ§ ШӘЩҲ ШұШ§ЩҮЩҶЩ…Ш§ШҰЫҢ Ъ©ЩҶЫҢ ШЁШіЩҲЫҢ ШұШ§ЩҮЫҢ ШұШ§ШіШӘвҖҢ
fa.moezzi.text: ЩҲ ШЁШҜЫҢЩҶШіШ§ЩҶ ЩҲШӯЫҢ ЩҒШұШіШӘШ§ШҜЫҢЩ… ШЁШіЩҲЫҢ ШӘЩҲ ШұЩҲШӯЫҢ (ШұЩҲШ§ЩҶЫҢ) ШұШ§ Ш§ШІ Ш§Щ…Шұ Щ…Ш§ ЩҶШЁЩҲШҜЫҢ ШЁШҜШ§ЩҶЫҢ ЪҶЫҢШіШӘ Ъ©ШӘШ§ШЁ ЩҲ ЩҶЩҮ Ш§ЫҢЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩҲ Щ„ЫҢЪ©ЩҶ ЪҜШұШҜШ§ЩҶЫҢШҜЫҢЩ…Шҙ ШӘШ§ШЁШҙЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ ШұЩҮШЁШұЫҢ Ъ©ЩҶЫҢЩ… ШЁШҜШ§ЩҶ ЩҮШұ Ъ©ЩҮ ШұШ§ Ш®ЩҲШ§ЩҮЫҢЩ… Ш§ШІ ШЁЩҶШҜЪҜШ§ЩҶ Ш®ЩҲШҜ ЩҲ ЩҮЩ…Ш§ЩҶШ§ ШӘЩҲ ШұШ§ЩҮЩҶЩ…Ш§ШҰЫҢ Ъ©ЩҶЫҢ ШЁШіЩҲЫҢ ШұШ§ЩҮЫҢ ШұШ§ШіШӘвҖҢ

segments: ЩҲ ЩҮЩ…ЪҶЩҶЩҠЩҶ Ш§ШІ ЩҒШұЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш®ЩҲЩҠШҙ ШұЩҲШӯЩү- ЩӮШұШўЩҶ- ШұШ§ ШЁЩҮ ШӘЩҲ ЩҲШӯЩү ЩғШұШҜЩҠЩ…. ШӘЩҲ ЩҶЩ…ЩүвҖҢШҜШ§ЩҶШіШӘЩү ЩғЩҮ ЩғШӘШ§ШЁ ЩҲ Ш§ЩҠЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЪҶЩҠШіШӘ ЩҲ Щ„ЩҠЩғЩҶ Щ…Ш§ ШўЩҶ ШұШ§ ЩҶЩҲШұЩү ШіШ§Ш®ШӘЩҠЩ… ЩғЩҮ ШЁШҜШ§ЩҶ ЩҮШұ ЩғЩҮ ШұШ§ Ш§ШІ ШЁЩҶШҜЪҜШ§ЩҶ Ш®ЩҲЩҠШҙ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮЩҠЩ… ШұШ§ЩҮ ЩҶЩ…Ш§ЩҠЩҠЩ… ЩҲ ЩҮШұ ШўЩҠЩҶЩҮ ШӘЩҲ ШЁЩҮ ШұШ§ЩҮЩү ШұШ§ШіШӘ ШұШ§ЩҮ Щ…ЩүвҖҢЩҶЩ…Ш§ЩҠЩү
fa.mojtabavi.text: ЩҲ ЩҮЩ…ЪҶЩҶЩҠЩҶ Ш§ШІ ЩҒШұЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш®ЩҲЩҠШҙ ШұЩҲШӯЩү- ЩӮШұШўЩҶ- ШұШ§ ШЁЩҮ ШӘЩҲ ЩҲШӯЩү ЩғШұШҜЩҠЩ…. ШӘЩҲ ЩҶЩ…ЩүвҖҢШҜШ§ЩҶШіШӘЩү ЩғЩҮ ЩғШӘШ§ШЁ ЩҲ Ш§ЩҠЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЪҶЩҠШіШӘ ЩҲ Щ„ЩҠЩғЩҶ Щ…Ш§ ШўЩҶ ШұШ§ ЩҶЩҲШұЩү ШіШ§Ш®ШӘЩҠЩ… ЩғЩҮ ШЁШҜШ§ЩҶ ЩҮШұ ЩғЩҮ ШұШ§ Ш§ШІ ШЁЩҶШҜЪҜШ§ЩҶ Ш®ЩҲЩҠШҙ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮЩҠЩ… ШұШ§ЩҮ ЩҶЩ…Ш§ЩҠЩҠЩ… ЩҲ ЩҮШұ ШўЩҠЩҶЩҮ ШӘЩҲ ШЁЩҮ ШұШ§ЩҮЩү ШұШ§ШіШӘ ШұШ§ЩҮ Щ…ЩүвҖҢЩҶЩ…Ш§ЩҠЩү

segments: ЩҲЩҮЩ…ЫҢЩҶвҖҢЪҜЩҲЩҶЩҮ (Ш¬ЩҮШ§ЩҶвҖҢШҙЩ…ЩҲЩ„ ЩҲ ЩҫШ§ЫҢШҜШ§Шұ) Ш§ШІ Ш§Щ…Шұ Ш®ЩҲШҜЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШіЩҲЫҢ ШӘЩҲ ШұЩҲШӯЫҢ (Ш¬Ш§ЩҶвҖҢЩҒШІШ§) ЩҲШӯЫҢ Ъ©ШұШҜЫҢЩ…. ШӘЩҲ ЩҶЩ…ЫҢвҖҢШҜШ§ЩҶШіШӘЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢ ЩҶЩҮ (Ш§ЫҢЩҶ) Ъ©ШӘШ§ШЁ ЩҲ ЩҶЩҮ (Ш§ЫҢЩҶ) Ш§ЫҢЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЪҶЫҢШіШӘвҖҢШҹ ЩҲЩ„ЫҢ ШўЩҶ ШұШ§ ЩҶЩҲШұЫҢ ЪҜШұШҜШ§ЩҶЫҢШҜЫҢЩ… Ъ©ЩҮ ЩҮШұ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш§ШІ ШЁЩҶШҜЪҜШ§ЩҶ Ш®ЩҲШҜ ШұШ§ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮЫҢЩ… ШЁШ§ ШўЩҶ ШұШ§ЩҮ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЩҶЩ…Ш§ЫҢЫҢЩ…. ЩҲ ШЁЩҮвҖҢШұШ§ШіШӘЫҢ ШӘЩҲ ЩҮЩ…ЩҲШ§ШұЩҮ ШіЩҲЫҢ ШұШ§ЩҮЫҢ ШұШ§ШіШӘ ЩҮШҜШ§ЫҢШӘ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪ©ЩҶЫҢ.
fa.sadeqi.text: ЩҲЩҮЩ…ЫҢЩҶвҖҢЪҜЩҲЩҶЩҮ (Ш¬ЩҮШ§ЩҶвҖҢШҙЩ…ЩҲЩ„ ЩҲ ЩҫШ§ЫҢШҜШ§Шұ) Ш§ШІ Ш§Щ…Шұ Ш®ЩҲШҜЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШіЩҲЫҢ ШӘЩҲ ШұЩҲШӯЫҢ (Ш¬Ш§ЩҶвҖҢЩҒШІШ§) ЩҲШӯЫҢ Ъ©ШұШҜЫҢЩ…. ШӘЩҲ ЩҶЩ…ЫҢвҖҢШҜШ§ЩҶШіШӘЩҮвҖҢШ§ЫҢ ЩҶЩҮ (Ш§ЫҢЩҶ) Ъ©ШӘШ§ШЁ ЩҲ ЩҶЩҮ (Ш§ЫҢЩҶ) Ш§ЫҢЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЪҶЫҢШіШӘвҖҢШҹ ЩҲЩ„ЫҢ ШўЩҶ ШұШ§ ЩҶЩҲШұЫҢ ЪҜШұШҜШ§ЩҶЫҢШҜЫҢЩ… Ъ©ЩҮ ЩҮШұ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш§ШІ ШЁЩҶШҜЪҜШ§ЩҶ Ш®ЩҲШҜ ШұШ§ ШЁШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮЫҢЩ… ШЁШ§ ШўЩҶ ШұШ§ЩҮ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЩҶЩ…Ш§ЫҢЫҢЩ…. ЩҲ ШЁЩҮвҖҢШұШ§ШіШӘЫҢ ШӘЩҲ ЩҮЩ…ЩҲШ§ШұЩҮ ШіЩҲЫҢ ШұШ§ЩҮЫҢ ШұШ§ШіШӘ ЩҮШҜШ§ЫҢШӘ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪ©ЩҶЫҢ.

segments: ШөЩҗШұЩҺШ§Ш·Щҗ Ш§Щ„Щ„Щ‘ЩҺЩҮЩҗвҖҢ Ш§Щ„Щ‘ЩҺШ°ЩҗЩҠвҖҢ Щ„ЩҺЩҮЩҸвҖҢ Щ…ЩҺШ§ ЩҒЩҗЩҠвҖҢ Ш§Щ„ШіЩ‘ЩҺЩ…ЩҺШ§ЩҲЩҺШ§ШӘЩҗвҖҢ ЩҲЩҺ Щ…ЩҺШ§ ЩҒЩҗЩҠвҖҢ Ш§Щ„Щ’ШЈЩҺШұЩ’Ш¶ЩҗвҖҢ ШЈЩҺЩ„Ш§ЩҺ ШҘЩҗЩ„ЩҺЩүвҖҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„Щ‘ЩҺЩҮЩҗвҖҢ ШӘЩҺШөЩҗЩҠШұЩҸ Ш§Щ„Щ’ШЈЩҸЩ…ЩҸЩҲШұЩҸ
arabic.text: ШөЩҗШұЩҺШ§Ш·Щҗ Ш§Щ„Щ„Щ‘ЩҺЩҮЩҗвҖҢ Ш§Щ„Щ‘ЩҺШ°ЩҗЩҠвҖҢ Щ„ЩҺЩҮЩҸвҖҢ Щ…ЩҺШ§ ЩҒЩҗЩҠвҖҢ Ш§Щ„ШіЩ‘ЩҺЩ…ЩҺШ§ЩҲЩҺШ§ШӘЩҗвҖҢ ЩҲЩҺ Щ…ЩҺШ§ ЩҒЩҗЩҠвҖҢ Ш§Щ„Щ’ШЈЩҺШұЩ’Ш¶ЩҗвҖҢ ШЈЩҺЩ„Ш§ЩҺ ШҘЩҗЩ„ЩҺЩүвҖҢ Ш§Щ„Щ„Щ‘ЩҺЩҮЩҗвҖҢ ШӘЩҺШөЩҗЩҠШұЩҸ Ш§Щ„Щ’ШЈЩҸЩ…ЩҸЩҲШұЩҸ

segments: The path of God to whom belongs the kingdom of the heavens and the earth. And will not all things go back to God?
en.ahmedali.text: The path of God to whom belongs the kingdom of the heavens and the earth. And will not all things go back to God?

segments: The path of Allah вҖ“ the One to Whom only belongs all whatever is in the heavens and all whatever is in the earth; pay heed! Towards Allah only do all matters return.
en.ahmedraza.text: The path of Allah вҖ“ the One to Whom only belongs all whatever is in the heavens and all whatever is in the earth; pay heed! Towards Allah only do all matters return.

segments: the path of God, to whom belongs whatsoever is in the heavens, and whatsoever is in the earth. Surely unto God all things come home.
en.arberry.text: the path of God, to whom belongs whatsoever is in the heavens, and whatsoever is in the earth. Surely unto God all things come home.

segments: The path of Allah, Whose is whatsoever is in the heavens and whatsoever is in the earth. Lo! Unto Allah trend all affairs.
en.daryabadi.text: The path of Allah, Whose is whatsoever is in the heavens and whatsoever is in the earth. Lo! Unto Allah trend all affairs.

segments: The Path of Allah, to Whom belongs all that is in the heavens and all that is in the earth. Verily, all the matters at the end go to Allah (for decision).
en.hilali.text: The Path of Allah, to Whom belongs all that is in the heavens and all that is in the earth. Verily, all the matters at the end go to Allah (for decision).

segments: The path of God, to whom belongs everything in the heavens and everything on earth. Indeed, to God all matters revert.
en.itani.text: The path of God, to whom belongs everything in the heavens and everything on earth. Indeed, to God all matters revert.

segments: the Way of Allah, to Whom belongs the dominion of all that is in the heavens and the earth. Lo, it is to Allah that all things ultimately revert.
en.maududi.text: the Way of Allah, to Whom belongs the dominion of all that is in the heavens and the earth. Lo, it is to Allah that all things ultimately revert.

segments: The path of Allah to Whom belongs all that is in the heavens and all that is on the earth. Verily, all matters at the end go to Allah.
en.mubarakpuri.text: The path of Allah to Whom belongs all that is in the heavens and all that is on the earth. Verily, all matters at the end go to Allah.

segments: The path of Allah, unto Whom belongeth whatsoever is in the heavens and whatsoever is in the earth. Do not all things reach Allah at last?
en.pickthall.text: The path of Allah, unto Whom belongeth whatsoever is in the heavens and whatsoever is in the earth. Do not all things reach Allah at last?

segments: the path of Allah, to whom belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is in the earth. Indeed all matters return to Allah!
en.qarai.text: the path of Allah, to whom belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is in the earth. Indeed all matters return to Allah!

segments: The Path of Allah, to whom belongs all that is in the heavens and all that is in the earth. Surely, to Allah all things return.
en.qaribullah.text: The Path of Allah, to whom belongs all that is in the heavens and all that is in the earth. Surely, to Allah all things return.

segments: The path of Allah, to whom belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth. Unquestionably, to Allah do [all] matters evolve.
en.sahih.text: The path of Allah, to whom belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth. Unquestionably, to Allah do [all] matters evolve.

segments: the path of God who is the owner of all that is in the heavens and the earth. To God certainly do all matters return.
en.sarwar.text: the path of God who is the owner of all that is in the heavens and the earth. To God certainly do all matters return.

segments: The path of Allah, Whose is whatsoever is in the heavens and whatsoever is in the earth; now surely to Allah do all affairs eventually come.
en.shakir.text: The path of Allah, Whose is whatsoever is in the heavens and whatsoever is in the earth; now surely to Allah do all affairs eventually come.

segments: Sirati Allahi allathee lahu ma fee alssamawati wama fee alardi ala ila Allahi taseeru alomooru
en.transliteration.text: Sirati Allahi allathee lahu ma fee alssamawati wama fee alardi ala ila Allahi taseeru alomooru

segments: the path of God, to whom belongs all that is in the heavens and on the earth. Indeed all matters return eventually to God.
en.wahiduddin.text: the path of God, to whom belongs all that is in the heavens and on the earth. Indeed all matters return eventually to God.

segments: The Way of Allah, to Whom belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on earth. Behold (how) all affairs tend towards Allah!
en.yusufali.text: The Way of Allah, to Whom belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on earth. Behold (how) all affairs tend towards Allah!

segments: ШұШ§ЩҮ ШўЩҶ Ш®ШҜШ§ЫҢЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШҜШұ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШҜШұ ШІЩ…ЫҢЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘШҢ ЩҒЩӮШ· ШҜШұ ШіЫҢШ·ШұЩҮ Щ…Ш§Щ„Ъ©ЫҢЩ‘ШӘ ЩҲ ЩҒШұЩ…Ш§ЩҶШұЩҲШ§ЫҢЫҢ Ш§ЩҲШіШӘ. ШўЪҜШ§ЩҮ ШЁШ§ШҙЫҢШҜ! Ъ©ЩҮ ЩҮЩ…ЩҮ Ш§Щ…ЩҲШұ ШЁЩҮ ШіЩҲЫҢ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШЁШ§ШІЩ…ЫҢ ЪҜШұШҜШҜ.
fa.ansarian.text: ШұШ§ЩҮ ШўЩҶ Ш®ШҜШ§ЫҢЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШҜШұ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШҜШұ ШІЩ…ЫҢЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘШҢ ЩҒЩӮШ· ШҜШұ ШіЫҢШ·ШұЩҮ Щ…Ш§Щ„Ъ©ЫҢЩ‘ШӘ ЩҲ ЩҒШұЩ…Ш§ЩҶШұЩҲШ§ЫҢЫҢ Ш§ЩҲШіШӘ. ШўЪҜШ§ЩҮ ШЁШ§ШҙЫҢШҜ! Ъ©ЩҮ ЩҮЩ…ЩҮ Ш§Щ…ЩҲШұ ШЁЩҮ ШіЩҲЫҢ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШЁШ§ШІЩ…ЫҢ ЪҜШұШҜШҜ.

segments: ШұШ§ЩҮ ШўЩҶ Ш®ШҜШ§ЩҠЩү ЩғЩҮ Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶ Ш§ЩҲШіШӘ ЩҮШұ ЪҶЩҮ ШҜШұ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ШІЩ…ЩҠЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘ. ШўЪҜШ§ЩҮ ШЁШ§ШҙЩҠШҜ ЩғЩҮ ЩҮЩ…ЩҮ ЩғШ§ШұЩҮШ§ ШЁЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШЁШ§ШІ Щ…ЩүвҖҢЪҜШұШҜШҜ.
fa.ayati.text: ШұШ§ЩҮ ШўЩҶ Ш®ШҜШ§ЩҠЩү ЩғЩҮ Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶ Ш§ЩҲШіШӘ ЩҮШұ ЪҶЩҮ ШҜШұ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ШІЩ…ЩҠЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘ. ШўЪҜШ§ЩҮ ШЁШ§ШҙЩҠШҜ ЩғЩҮ ЩҮЩ…ЩҮ ЩғШ§ШұЩҮШ§ ШЁЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШЁШ§ШІ Щ…ЩүвҖҢЪҜШұШҜШҜ.

segments: ШұШ§ЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ЩҠЩү ЩғЩҮ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШҜШұ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶвҖҢЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШҜШұ ШІЩ…ЩҠЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘ Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶ Ш§ЩҲШіШӘ. ШўЪҜШ§ЩҮ ШЁШ§Шҙ ЩғЩҮ ЩғШ§ШұЩҮШ§ ШЁЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШЁШ§ШІ Щ…ЩүвҖҢЪҜШұШҜШҜ
fa.bahrampour.text: ШұШ§ЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ЩҠЩү ЩғЩҮ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШҜШұ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶвҖҢЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШҜШұ ШІЩ…ЩҠЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘ Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶ Ш§ЩҲШіШӘ. ШўЪҜШ§ЩҮ ШЁШ§Шҙ ЩғЩҮ ЩғШ§ШұЩҮШ§ ШЁЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШЁШ§ШІ Щ…ЩүвҖҢЪҜШұШҜШҜ

segments: ШұШ§ЩҮ ЩҮЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш®ШҜШ§ЩҠЩү ЩғЩҮ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШҜШұ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШҜШұ ШІЩ…ЩҠЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘ Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶЩҗ Ш§ЩҲШіШӘ. ЩҮШҙвҖҢШҜШ§Шұ ЩғЩҮ [ЩҮЩ…ЩҮвҖҢ] ЩғШ§ШұЩҮШ§ ШЁЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШЁШ§ШІЩ…ЩүвҖҢЪҜШұШҜШҜ.
fa.fooladvand.text: ШұШ§ЩҮ ЩҮЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш®ШҜШ§ЩҠЩү ЩғЩҮ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШҜШұ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШҜШұ ШІЩ…ЩҠЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘ Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶЩҗ Ш§ЩҲШіШӘ. ЩҮШҙвҖҢШҜШ§Шұ ЩғЩҮ [ЩҮЩ…ЩҮвҖҢ] ЩғШ§ШұЩҮШ§ ШЁЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШЁШ§ШІЩ…ЩүвҖҢЪҜШұШҜШҜ.

segments: ЫҢШ№ЩҶЫҢ ШЁЩҮ ШұШ§ЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ ЩҮЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш®ШҜШ§ЫҢЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ ЩҮШұ ЪҶЩҮ ШҜШұ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ШІЩ…ЫҢЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘ ЩҮЩ…ЩҮ Щ…Щ„Ъ© Ш§ЩҲШіШӘШҢ Ш§Щ„Ш§ ШЁШҜШ§ЩҶЫҢШҜ Ъ©ЩҮ ШұШ¬ЩҲШ№ ШӘЩ…Ш§Щ… Ш§Щ…ЩҲШұ (Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ… ШўЩҒШұЫҢЩҶШҙ) ШЁЩҮ ШіЩҲЫҢ Ш®ШҜШ§ШіШӘ.
fa.ghomshei.text: ЫҢШ№ЩҶЫҢ ШЁЩҮ ШұШ§ЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ ЩҮЩ…Ш§ЩҶ Ш®ШҜШ§ЫҢЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ ЩҮШұ ЪҶЩҮ ШҜШұ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ШІЩ…ЫҢЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘ ЩҮЩ…ЩҮ Щ…Щ„Ъ© Ш§ЩҲШіШӘШҢ Ш§Щ„Ш§ ШЁШҜШ§ЩҶЫҢШҜ Ъ©ЩҮ ШұШ¬ЩҲШ№ ШӘЩ…Ш§Щ… Ш§Щ…ЩҲШұ (Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ… ШўЩҒШұЫҢЩҶШҙ) ШЁЩҮ ШіЩҲЫҢ Ш®ШҜШ§ШіШӘ.

segments: ШұШ§ЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ШҰЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ Щ…ШӘШ№Щ„Щ‘ЩӮ ШЁШҜЩҲ Ш§ШіШӘ ЩҮЩ…ЩҮвҖҢЫҢ ЪҶЫҢШІЩҮШ§ШҰЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ ШҜШұ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ШІЩ…ЫҢЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘ. ЩҮШ§ЩҶ! ЩҮЩ…ЩҮвҖҢЫҢ Ъ©Ш§ШұЩҮШ§ ШЁЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШЁШ§ШІЩ…ЫҢвҖҢЪҜШұШҜШҜ (ЩҲ ЩҮШұ Ъ©Ш§ШұЫҢ ШӘШӯШӘ ЩҶШёШ§ШұШӘ ШҜЩӮЫҢЩӮ Ш§ЩҲ ЩҲ ШЁШ§ Ш§Ш·Щ‘Щ„Ш§Ш№ ЩҲ Ш§Ш¬Ш§ШІЩҮвҖҢЫҢ Ш§ЩҲ Ш§ЩҶШ¬Ш§Щ… Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЩҫШ°ЫҢШұШҜШҢ ЩҲ ЩҮШұ ЪҶЫҢШІЫҢ ШЁШҜЩҲ Щ…ШұШЁЩҲШ· Ш§ШіШӘ). [[В«ШөЩҗШұЩҺШ§Ш·ЩҚВ»: ШЁШҜЩ„ Ш§ШІ (ШөЩҗШұЩҺШ§Ш·ЩҚ) ШўЫҢЩҮ ЩӮШЁЩ„ЫҢ Ш§ШіШӘ. В«Ш§ЩҺЩ„Ш§ ШҘЩҗЩ„ЩҺЫҢвҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЩҮЩҗ ШӘЩҺШөЩҗЫҢШұЩҸ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҸЩ…ЩҸЩҲШұЩҸВ»: (ЩҶЪҜШ§: ШЁЩӮШұЩҮ / 285ШҢ ШўЩ„вҖҢШ№Щ…ШұШ§ЩҶ / 28ШҢ Щ…Ш§ШҰШҜЩҮ / 18). В«ШӘЩҺШөЩҗЫҢШұЩҸВ»: Щ…ЩҶШӘЩҮЫҢ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪҜШұШҜШҜ. ШЁШұЩ…ЫҢвҖҢЪҜШұШҜШҜ. ШұШ¬ЩҲШ№ ЩҲ ШЁШұЪҜШҙШӘ ШҜШ§ШұШҜ.]]
fa.khorramdel.text: ШұШ§ЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ШҰЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ Щ…ШӘШ№Щ„Щ‘ЩӮ ШЁШҜЩҲ Ш§ШіШӘ ЩҮЩ…ЩҮвҖҢЫҢ ЪҶЫҢШІЩҮШ§ШҰЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ ШҜШұ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ШІЩ…ЫҢЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘ. ЩҮШ§ЩҶ! ЩҮЩ…ЩҮвҖҢЫҢ Ъ©Ш§ШұЩҮШ§ ШЁЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШЁШ§ШІЩ…ЫҢвҖҢЪҜШұШҜШҜ (ЩҲ ЩҮШұ Ъ©Ш§ШұЫҢ ШӘШӯШӘ ЩҶШёШ§ШұШӘ ШҜЩӮЫҢЩӮ Ш§ЩҲ ЩҲ ШЁШ§ Ш§Ш·Щ‘Щ„Ш§Ш№ ЩҲ Ш§Ш¬Ш§ШІЩҮвҖҢЫҢ Ш§ЩҲ Ш§ЩҶШ¬Ш§Щ… Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЩҫШ°ЫҢШұШҜШҢ ЩҲ ЩҮШұ ЪҶЫҢШІЫҢ ШЁШҜЩҲ Щ…ШұШЁЩҲШ· Ш§ШіШӘ). [[В«ШөЩҗШұЩҺШ§Ш·ЩҚВ»: ШЁШҜЩ„ Ш§ШІ (ШөЩҗШұЩҺШ§Ш·ЩҚ) ШўЫҢЩҮ ЩӮШЁЩ„ЫҢ Ш§ШіШӘ. В«Ш§ЩҺЩ„Ш§ ШҘЩҗЩ„ЩҺЫҢвҖҢШ§Щ„Щ„ЩҮЩҗ ШӘЩҺШөЩҗЫҢШұЩҸ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҸЩ…ЩҸЩҲШұЩҸВ»: (ЩҶЪҜШ§: ШЁЩӮШұЩҮ / 285ШҢ ШўЩ„вҖҢШ№Щ…ШұШ§ЩҶ / 28ШҢ Щ…Ш§ШҰШҜЩҮ / 18). В«ШӘЩҺШөЩҗЫҢШұЩҸВ»: Щ…ЩҶШӘЩҮЫҢ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪҜШұШҜШҜ. ШЁШұЩ…ЫҢвҖҢЪҜШұШҜШҜ. ШұШ¬ЩҲШ№ ЩҲ ШЁШұЪҜШҙШӘ ШҜШ§ШұШҜ.]]

segments: ШұШ§ЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ЩҲЩҶШҜЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШҜШұ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШҜШұ ШІЩ…ЫҢЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘШҢ Ш§ЩҲ ШұШ§ШіШӘШҢ ШЁШҜШ§ЩҶЫҢШҜ Ъ©ЩҮ Ъ©Ш§ШұЩҮШ§ ШЁЩҮ ШіЩҲЫҢ Ш®ШҜШ§ЩҲЩҶШҜ ШЁШ§ШІ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪҜШұШҜШҜ
fa.khorramshahi.text: ШұШ§ЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ЩҲЩҶШҜЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШҜШұ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШҜШұ ШІЩ…ЫҢЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘШҢ Ш§ЩҲ ШұШ§ШіШӘШҢ ШЁШҜШ§ЩҶЫҢШҜ Ъ©ЩҮ Ъ©Ш§ШұЩҮШ§ ШЁЩҮ ШіЩҲЫҢ Ш®ШҜШ§ЩҲЩҶШҜ ШЁШ§ШІ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢЪҜШұШҜШҜ

segments: ШұШ§ЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ЩҲЩҶШҜЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ ШӘЩ…Ш§Щ…ЫҢ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШҜШұ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШҜШұ ШІЩ…ЫҢЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘ Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶ Ш§ЩҲШіШӘШӣ ШўЪҜШ§ЩҮ ШЁШ§ШҙЫҢШҜ Ъ©ЩҮ ЩҮЩ…ЩҮ Ъ©Ш§ШұЩҮШ§ ШӘЩҶЩҮШ§ ШЁШіЩҲЫҢ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШЁШ§ШІЩ…ЫҢвҖҢЪҜШұШҜШҜ!
fa.makarem.text: ШұШ§ЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ЩҲЩҶШҜЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ ШӘЩ…Ш§Щ…ЫҢ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШҜШұ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШҜШұ ШІЩ…ЫҢЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘ Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶ Ш§ЩҲШіШӘШӣ ШўЪҜШ§ЩҮ ШЁШ§ШҙЫҢШҜ Ъ©ЩҮ ЩҮЩ…ЩҮ Ъ©Ш§ШұЩҮШ§ ШӘЩҶЩҮШ§ ШЁШіЩҲЫҢ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШЁШ§ШІЩ…ЫҢвҖҢЪҜШұШҜШҜ!

segments: ШұШ§ЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ШҰЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ ШұШ§ Ш§ШіШӘ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШҜШұ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШҜШұ ШІЩ…ЫҢЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘ ЩҮЩ…Ш§ЩҶШ§ ШЁШіЩҲЫҢ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШЁШ§ШІЪҜШұШҜЩҶШҜ Ъ©Ш§ШұЩҮШ§
fa.moezzi.text: ШұШ§ЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ШҰЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ ШұШ§ Ш§ШіШӘ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШҜШұ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШҜШұ ШІЩ…ЫҢЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘ ЩҮЩ…Ш§ЩҶШ§ ШЁШіЩҲЫҢ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШЁШ§ШІЪҜШұШҜЩҶШҜ Ъ©Ш§ШұЩҮШ§

segments: ШұШ§ЩҮ ШўЩҶ Ш®ШҜШ§ЩҠЩү ЩғЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ ШұШ§ШіШӘ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШҜШұ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШҜШұ ШІЩ…ЩҠЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘ. ШўЪҜШ§ЩҮ ШЁШ§ШҙЩҠШҜ ЩғЩҮ ЩҮЩ…ЩҮ ЩғШ§ШұЩҮШ§ ШЁЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШЁШ§ШІ Щ…ЩүвҖҢЪҜШұШҜШҜ.
fa.mojtabavi.text: ШұШ§ЩҮ ШўЩҶ Ш®ШҜШ§ЩҠЩү ЩғЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ ШұШ§ШіШӘ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШҜШұ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШҜШұ ШІЩ…ЩҠЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘ. ШўЪҜШ§ЩҮ ШЁШ§ШҙЩҠШҜ ЩғЩҮ ЩҮЩ…ЩҮ ЩғШ§ШұЩҮШ§ ШЁЩҮ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШЁШ§ШІ Щ…ЩүвҖҢЪҜШұШҜШҜ.

segments: ШұШ§ЩҮ (ЩҮЩ…Ш§ЩҶ) Ш®ШҜШ§ЫҢЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШҜШұ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶвҖҢЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШҜШұ ШІЩ…ЫҢЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘ ШӘЩҶЩҮШ§ Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶЩҗ Ш§ЩҲШіШӘ. ЩҮШ§ЩҶ! ЩҮЩ…ЩҮвҖҢЫҢ Ъ©Ш§ШұЩҮШ§ ЩҲ (ЩҮЩ…ЩҮвҖҢЫҢ) ЪҶЫҢШІЩҮШ§ ШӘЩҶЩҮШ§ ШіЩҲЫҢ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШЁШ§ШІЩ…ЫҢвҖҢЪҜШұШҜЩҶШҜ.
fa.sadeqi.text: ШұШ§ЩҮ (ЩҮЩ…Ш§ЩҶ) Ш®ШҜШ§ЫҢЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШҜШұ ШўШіЩ…Ш§ЩҶвҖҢЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ШўЩҶЪҶЩҮ ШҜШұ ШІЩ…ЫҢЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘ ШӘЩҶЩҮШ§ Ш§ШІ ШўЩҶЩҗ Ш§ЩҲШіШӘ. ЩҮШ§ЩҶ! ЩҮЩ…ЩҮвҖҢЫҢ Ъ©Ш§ШұЩҮШ§ ЩҲ (ЩҮЩ…ЩҮвҖҢЫҢ) ЪҶЫҢШІЩҮШ§ ШӘЩҶЩҮШ§ ШіЩҲЫҢ Ш®ШҜШ§ ШЁШ§ШІЩ…ЫҢвҖҢЪҜШұШҜЩҶШҜ.
